description_ja: 長い　しっぽや　手などを　使って 相手を　はたいて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使用长长的尾巴或手等 拍打对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is physically pounded with a long tail, a foreleg, or the like.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.

description_ja: 力を　こめた　パンチで 相手を　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用充满力量的拳头攻击对手。
description_en: The target is slugged by a punch thrown with muscle-packed power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 相手の　体に 小判を　投げつけて　攻撃する。 戦闘の　あとで　お金が　もらえる。
description_zh: 向对手的身体 投掷小金币进行攻击。 战斗后可以拿到钱。
description_en: Coins are hurled at the target to inflict damage. Money is earned after the battle.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  After the battle ends, the winner receives five times the user’s level in extra money for each time this move was used.

description_ja: 炎を　こめた　パンチで 相手を　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用充满火焰的拳头攻击对手。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The target is attacked with a fiery punch. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

description_ja: 冷気を　こめた　パンチで 相手を　攻撃する。 こおり状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用充满寒气的拳头攻击对手。 有时会让对手陷入冰冻状态。
description_en: The target is attacked with an icy punch. This may also leave the target frozen.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

description_ja: 電撃を　こめた　パンチで 相手を　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用充满电流的拳头攻击对手。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The target is attacked with an electrified punch. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: 硬く　とがった　鋭い　ツメで 相手を　ひっかいて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用坚硬且无比锋利的爪子 抓对手进行攻击。
description_en: Hard, pointed, sharp claws rake the target to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 相手を　両側から　はさんで ダメージを　あたえる。
description_zh: 将对手从两侧夹住， 给予伤害。
description_en: The target is gripped and squeezed from both sides to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 大きな　ハサミで 相手を　切り裂いて　攻撃する。 当たれば　一撃で　ひんしに　する。
description_zh: 用大钳子或剪刀等 夹断对手进行攻击。 只要命中就会一击濒死。
description_en: A vicious tearing attack with big pincers. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.
effect_en: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.  User charges for one turn before attacking.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: 戦いの舞を　激しく　おどって 気合を　高める。 自分の　攻撃を　ぐーんと　あげる。
description_zh: 激烈地跳起战舞提高气势。 大幅提高自己的攻击。
description_en: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply boosts the user's Attack stat.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

description_ja: カマや　ツメなどで 相手を　切りつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用镰刀或爪子等 切斩对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is cut with a scythe or claw.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 翼で　おこした　激しい　風を 相手に　ぶつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用翅膀将刮起的狂风 袭向对手进行攻击。
description_en: A gust of wind is whipped up by wings and launched at the target to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, this move will hit with double power.

description_ja: 大きく　ひろげた　りっぱな　翼を 相手に　ぶつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 大大地展开美丽的翅膀， 将其撞向对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is struck with large, imposing wings spread wide to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 相手を　吹きとばして 控えの　ポケモンを　ひきずりだす。 野生の　場合は　戦闘が　終わる。
description_zh: 吹飞对手，强制拉后备宝可梦上场。 如果对手为野生宝可梦， 战斗将直接结束。
description_en: The target is blown away, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.
effect_en: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.  Doesn’t affect Pokémon with suction cups or under the effect of ingrain.

description_ja: １ターン目で　空へ　飛び ２ターン目に　相手を　攻撃する。
description_zh: 第１回合飞上天空， 第２回合攻击对手。
description_en: The user flies up into the sky on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User flies high into the air for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  During the immune turn, gust, hurricane, sky uppercut, smack down, thunder, twister, and whirlwind still hit the user normally.  gust and twister also have double power against the user.  The damage from hail and sandstorm still applies during the immune turn.  The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard.  This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: 長い　体や　つるなどを　使い ４ー５ターンの　間 相手を　締めつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使用长长的身体或藤蔓等， 在４～５回合内 绑紧对手进行攻击。
description_en: A long body, tentacles, or the like are used to bind and squeeze the target for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.

description_ja: 長い　しっぽや　つるなどを　使い 相手を　たたきつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使用长长的尾巴或藤蔓等 摔打对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is slammed with a long tail, vines, or the like to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ムチのように　しなる　細長い　つるで 相手を　たたきつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用如同鞭子般弯曲而细长的藤蔓 摔打对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is struck with slender, whiplike vines to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 大きな　足で 相手を　踏みつけて　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 用大脚踩踏对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user attacks by stomping on the target with a big foot. This may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Power is doubled against Pokémon that have used minimize since entering the field.

description_ja: ２本の　足で　相手を　けとばして 攻撃する。　２回連続で ダメージを　与える。
description_zh: 用２只脚踢飞对手进行攻击。 连续２次给予伤害。
description_en: The user attacks by kicking the target twice in a row using two feet.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.

description_ja: ものすごい　力を　こめた　キックで 相手を　けとばして　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使出力大无穷的重踢 踢飞对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is attacked by a kick launched with muscle-packed power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage. If this move misses, is blocked by protect or detect, or has no effect, the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP rounded down.  This move cannot be used while gravity is in effect.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: 相手の　顔に　砂を　かけて 命中率を　さげる。
description_zh: 向对手脸上泼沙子， 从而降低命中率。
description_en: Sand is hurled in the target's face, lowering the target's accuracy.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

description_ja: 頭を　突きだして まっすぐ　つっこんで　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 将头伸出， 笔直地扑向对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user sticks out its head and attacks by charging straight into the target. This may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: 鋭く　とがった　つので 相手を　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用尖锐的角攻击对手。
description_en: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed horn to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: つのや　くちばしで 相手を　つついて　攻撃する。 ２ー５回の　間　連続で　だす。
description_zh: 用角或喙 刺向对手进行攻击。 连续攻击２～５次。
description_en: The user attacks by jabbing the target with a horn, a beak, or the like. This move hits two to five times in a row.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.

description_ja: 回転する　つのを 相手に　突き刺して　攻撃する。 当たれば　一撃で　ひんしに　する。
description_zh: 用旋转的角 刺入对手进行攻击。 只要命中就会一击濒死。
description_en: The user stabs the target with a horn that rotates like a drill. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.
effect_en: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.

description_ja: 相手に　むかって　全身で ぶつかっていき　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用整个身体 撞向对手进行攻击。
description_en: A physical attack in which the user charges and slams into the target with its whole body.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 全身で 相手に　のしかかり　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用整个身体 压住对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user attacks by dropping onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: 長い　体や　つるなどを　使って ４ー５ターンの　間 相手に　まきついて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使用长长的身体或藤蔓等， 在４～５回合内 紧束对手进行攻击。
description_en: A long body, vines, or the like are used to wrap and squeeze the target for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.

description_ja: すごい　勢いで 相手に　ぶつかって　攻撃する。 自分も　少し　ダメージを　受ける。
description_zh: 以惊人的气势 撞向对手进行攻击。 自己也会受到少许伤害。
description_en: A reckless full-body charge attack for slamming into the target. This also damages the user a little.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

description_ja: ２ー３ターンの　間 暴れまくって　相手を　攻撃する。 暴れたあとは　混乱する。
description_zh: 在２～３回合内， 乱打一气地攻击对手。 大闹一番后自己会陷入混乱。
description_en: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.  safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.

description_ja: 命を　懸けて 相手に　突進して　攻撃する。 自分も　かなり　ダメージを　受ける。
description_zh: 拼命地猛撞向对手进行攻击。 自己也会受到不小的伤害。
description_en: A reckless life-risking tackle in which the user rushes the target. This also damages the user quite a lot.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/3 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

description_ja: しっぽを　左右に　かわいく　ふって 油断を　誘う。 相手の　防御を　さげる。
description_zh: 可爱地左右摇晃尾巴， 诱使对手疏忽大意。 会降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user wags its tail cutely, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Defense stats.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 毒の　ある　ハリを 相手に　突き刺して　攻撃する。 毒状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 将有毒的针 刺入对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入中毒状态。
description_en: The user stabs the target with a poisonous stinger to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in the same turn.  Has a 20% chance to poison the target.

description_ja: 鋭い　ハリを 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 ２ー５回の　間　連続で　だす。
description_zh: 向对手发射 锐针进行攻击。 连续攻击２～５次。
description_en: The user attacks by shooting sharp spikes at the target. This move hits two to five times in a row.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.

description_ja: 鋭い　目つきで　おびえさせて 相手の　防御を　さげる。
description_zh: 用犀利的眼神使其害怕， 从而降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user gives opposing Pokémon an intimidating leer that lowers their Defense stats.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 鋭く　とがった　歯で かみついて　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 用尖锐的牙 咬住对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The target is bitten with viciously sharp fangs. This may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: かわいい　なきごえを　聞かせて 気を　ひき　油断を　させて 相手の　攻撃を　さげる。
description_zh: 让对手听可爱的叫声， 引开注意力使其疏忽， 从而降低对手的攻击。
description_en: The user growls in an endearing way, making opposing Pokémon less wary. This lowers their Attack stats.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

description_ja: 相手を　逃がして 控えの　ポケモンを　ひきずりだす。 野生の　場合は　戦闘が　終わる。
description_zh: 放走对手，强制拉后备宝可梦上场。 如果对手为野生宝可梦， 战斗将直接结束。
description_en: The target is scared off, and a different Pokémon is dragged out. In the wild, this ends a battle against a single Pokémon.
effect_en: Switches the target out for another of its trainer’s Pokémon selected at random.  Wild battles end immediately.  Doesn’t affect Pokémon with suction cups or under the effect of ingrain.

description_ja: 心地好い　きれいな 歌声を　聞かせて 相手を　眠り状態に　する。
description_zh: 让对手听舒适、 美妙的歌声， 从而陷入睡眠状态。
description_en: A soothing lullaby is sung in a beautiful voice that puts the target to sleep.
effect_en: Puts the target to sleep.

description_ja: 特殊な　音波を 体から　発して 相手を　混乱させる。
description_zh: 从身体发出 特殊的音波， 从而使对手混乱。
description_en: The user generates odd sound waves from its body that confuse the target.
effect_en: Confuses the target.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts exactly 20 damage.

description_ja: 相手の　動きを　とめて 直前に　だしていた　技を ４ターンの　間　使えなくする。
description_zh: 阻碍对手行动， 之前使出的招式 将在４回合内无法使用。
description_en: For four turns, the target will be unable to use whichever move it last used.
effect_en: Disables the target’s last used move, preventing its use for 4–7 turns, selected at random, or until the target leaves the field.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed,  if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, or if it already has a move disabled, this move will fail.

description_ja: 強い　酸を　相手に　かけて 攻撃する。　相手の　特防を さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 将强酸泼向对手进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的特防。
description_en: Opposing Pokémon are attacked with a spray of harsh acid. This may also lower their Sp. Def stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 小さな　炎を 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发射 小型火焰进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The target is attacked with small flames. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

description_ja: 激しい　炎を 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发射 烈焰进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

description_ja: 白い霧で　体を　おおう。 ５ターンの　間　相手に 能力を　さげられなく　なる。
description_zh: 用白雾覆盖身体。 在５回合内不会让对手 降低自己的能力。
description_en: The user cloaks itself and its allies in a white mist that prevents any of their stats from being lowered for five turns.
effect_en: Pokémon on the user’s side of the field are immune to stat-lowering effects for five turns.  guard swap, heart swap, and power swap may still be used.  defog used by an opponent will end this effect.

description_ja: 水を　勢いよく 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。
description_zh: 向对手猛烈地喷射 水流进行攻击。
description_en: The target is blasted with a forceful shot of water.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 大量の　水を 激しい　勢いで 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。
description_zh: 向对手猛烈地喷射 大量水流进行攻击。
description_en: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 大きな　波で　自分の 周りに　いるものを　攻撃する。
description_zh: 利用大浪 攻击自己周围所有的宝可梦。
description_en: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is in the first turn of dive, this move will hit with double power.

description_ja: 凍える　ビームを 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 こおり状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发射 冰冻光束进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入冰冻状态。
description_en: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

description_ja: 激しい　吹雪を 相手に　吹きつけて　攻撃する。 こおり状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 将猛烈的暴风雪 刮向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入冰冻状态。
description_en: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.  During hail, this move has 100% accuracy.  It also has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection of protect and detect.

description_ja: 不思議な　光線を 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 混乱させることが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发射 神奇的光线进行攻击。 有时会使对手混乱。
description_en: The target is attacked with a peculiar ray. This may also confuse the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

description_ja: 泡を　勢いよく 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 素早さを　さげる　ことが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手猛烈地喷射 泡沫进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的速度。
description_en: A spray of bubbles is forcefully ejected at the target. This may also lower the target's Speed stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

description_ja: にじいろの　ビームを 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 攻撃を　さげる　ことが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发射 虹色光束进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的攻击。
description_en: The target is hit with a rainbow-colored beam. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Attack by one stage.

description_ja: 強い　光線を 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 次の　ターンは　動けなくなる。
description_zh: 向对手发射 强烈的光线进行攻击。 下一回合自己将无法动弹。
description_en: The target is attacked with a powerful beam. The user can't move on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

description_ja: 鋭く　とがった　くちばしや　つので 相手を　突いて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用尖锐的喙或角 刺向对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is jabbed with a sharply pointed beak or horn to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 回転しながら　とがった　くちばしを 相手に　突き刺して　攻撃する。
description_zh: 一边旋转，一边将尖喙 刺入对手进行攻击。
description_en: A corkscrewing attack that strikes the target with a sharp beak acting as a drill.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 地面に　自分ごと 相手を　投げつけて　攻撃する。 自分も　少し　ダメージを　受ける。
description_zh: 将对手连同自己一起 摔向地面进行攻击。 自己也会受到少许伤害。
description_en: The user grabs the target and recklessly dives for the ground. This also damages the user a little.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User takes 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

description_ja: 足を　強く　けり 相手を　転ばせて　攻撃する。 相手が　重いほど　威力が　あがる。
description_zh: 用力踢对手的脚， 使其摔倒进行攻击。 对手越重，威力越大。
description_en: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the target’s weight in kilograms, to a maximum of 120.  Target’s weight | Power --------------- | ----: Up to 10kg      |    20 Up to 25kg      |    40 Up to 50kg      |    60 Up to 100kg     |    80 Up to 200kg     |   100 Above 200kg     |   120

description_ja: 相手から　受けた　物理攻撃の ダメージを　２倍に　して 同じ　相手に　返す。
description_zh: 从对手那里受到 物理攻击的伤害将以 ２倍返还给同一个对手。
description_en: A retaliatory attack that counters any physical move, inflicting double the damage taken.
effect_en: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a physical move this turn.  Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user.  If there is no eligible target, this move will fail.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 引力を　使い　投げとばす。 自分の　レベルと　同じ　ダメージを 相手に　与える。
description_zh: 利用引力将对手甩飞出去。 给予对手和自己等级相同的伤害。
description_en: The target is thrown using the power of gravity. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.
effect_en: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

description_ja: こん身の　力で 相手を　なぐりつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使出浑身力气 殴打对手进行攻击。
description_en: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 養分を　吸い取り　攻撃する。 相手に　与えた　ダメージの 半分の　ＨＰを　回復できる。
description_zh: 吸取对手的养分进行攻击。 可以回复给予对手 伤害的一半ＨＰ。
description_en: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

description_ja: 養分を　吸い取り　攻撃する。 相手に　与えた　ダメージの 半分の　ＨＰを　回復できる。
description_zh: 吸取对手的养分进行攻击。 可以回复给予对手 伤害的一半ＨＰ。
description_en: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

description_ja: 植えつけた　相手の　ＨＰを 毎ターン　少しだけ　吸い取り 自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。
description_zh: 植入寄生种子后，将在每回合 一点一点吸取对手的ＨＰ， 从而用来回复自己的ＨＰ。
description_en: A seed is planted on the target. It steals some HP from the target every turn.
effect_en: Plants a seed on the target that drains 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn and heals the user for the amount taken.  Has no effect on grass Pokémon.  The seed remains until the target leaves the field.  The user takes damage instead of being healed if the target has liquid ooze.  rapid spin will remove this effect.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.

description_ja: 体を　一気に 大きく　生長させて 攻撃と　特攻を　あげる。
description_zh: 让身体一下子长大， 从而提高攻击和特攻。
description_en: The user's body grows all at once, boosting the Attack and Sp. Atk stats.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.  During sunny day, raises both stats by two stages.

description_ja: はっぱを　とばして 相手を　切りつけて　攻撃する。 急所に　当たりやすい。
description_zh: 飞出叶片， 切斩对手进行攻击。 容易击中要害。
description_en: Sharp-edged leaves are launched to slash at opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

description_ja: １ターン目に　光を　いっぱいに　集め ２ターン目に　光の　束を 発射して　攻撃する。
description_zh: 第１回合收集满满的日光， 第２回合发射光束进行攻击。
description_en: The user gathers light on the first turn, then blasts a bundled beam on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User charges for one turn before attacking.  During sunny day, the charge turn is skipped.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, power is halved.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: 毒の　ある　粉を たくさん　ふりまいて 相手を　毒状態に　する。
description_zh: 撒出毒粉， 从而让对手陷入中毒状态。
description_en: The user scatters a cloud of poisonous dust that poisons the target.
effect_en: Poisons the target.

description_ja: しびれる　粉を たくさん　ふりまいて 相手を　まひ状態に　する。
description_zh: 撒出麻痹粉， 从而让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user scatters a cloud of numbing powder that paralyzes the target.
effect_en: Paralyzes the target.

description_ja: 眠くなる　粉を たくさん　ふりまいて 相手を　眠り状態に　する。
description_zh: 撒出催眠粉， 从而让对手陷入睡眠状态。
description_en: The user scatters a cloud of soporific dust that puts the target to sleep.
effect_en: Puts the target to sleep.

description_ja: ２ー３ターンの　間　花を まきちらして　相手を　攻撃する。 まきちらした　あとは　混乱する。
description_zh: 在２～３回合内， 散落花瓣攻击对手。 之后自己会陷入混乱。
description_en: The user attacks the target by scattering petals for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.  safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.

description_ja: 口から　吹きだした 糸を　まきつけて　相手の 素早さを　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 用口中吐出的丝缠绕对手， 从而大幅降低对手的速度。
description_en: The user blows silk from its mouth that binds opposing Pokémon and harshly lowers their Speed stats.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts exactly 40 damage.

description_ja: 激しく　渦をまく　炎の中に ４ー５ターンの　間 相手を　閉じこめて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 将对手困在 激烈的火焰旋涡中， 在４～５回合内进行攻击。
description_en: The user traps the target inside a fierce vortex of fire that inflicts damage for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.

description_ja: 電気の　刺激を 相手に　浴びせて　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 发出电流刺激对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user attacks the target with a jolt of electricity. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: 強い　電撃を 相手に　浴びせて　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发出 强力电击进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user attacks the target with a strong electric blast. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: 弱い　電撃を　浴びせることで 相手を　まひ状態に　する。
description_zh: 向对手发出 微弱的电击， 从而让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user launches a weak jolt of electricity that paralyzes the target.
effect_en: Paralyzes the target.

description_ja: 激しい　雷を 相手に　落として　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手劈下暴雷进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.  During rain dance, this move has 100% accuracy.  It also has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection of protect and detect.  During sunny day, this move has 50% accuracy.

description_ja: 小さな　岩を　持ちあげて 相手に　投げつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 拿起小岩石， 投掷对手进行攻击。
description_en: The user picks up and throws a small rock at the target to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 地震の　衝撃で　自分の 周りに　いるものを　攻撃する。
description_zh: 利用地震的冲击， 攻击自己周围所有的宝可梦。
description_en: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is in the first turn of dig, this move will hit with double power.

description_ja: 地割れの　裂け目に 相手を　落として　攻撃する。 当たれば　一撃で　ひんしに　する。
description_zh: 让对手掉落于地裂的 裂缝中进行攻击。 只要命中就会一击濒死。
description_en: The user opens up a fissure in the ground and drops the target in. The target faints instantly if this attack hits.
effect_en: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.

description_ja: １ターン目に　潜り　２ターン目で 相手を　攻撃する。
description_zh: 第１回合钻入， 第２回合攻击对手。
description_en: The user burrows into the ground on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User digs underground for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  During the immune turn, earthquake, fissure, and magnitude still hit the user normally, and their power is doubled if appropriate.  The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: 相手を　猛毒の　状態に　する。 ターンが　すすむほど 毒の　ダメージが　増えていく。
description_zh: 让对手陷入剧毒状态。 随着回合的推进， 中毒伤害会增加。
description_en: A move that leaves the target badly poisoned. Its poison damage worsens every turn.
effect_en: Badly poisons the target.  Never misses when used by a poison-type Pokémon.

description_ja: 弱い　念力を 相手に　送って　攻撃する。 相手を　混乱させることが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发送 微弱的念力进行攻击。 有时会使对手混乱。
description_en: The target is hit with a weak telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also confuse the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to confuse the target.

description_ja: 強い　念力を　相手に　送って 攻撃する。　相手の　特防を さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手发送 强大的念力进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的特防。
description_en: The target is hit with a strong telekinetic force to inflict damage. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 眠気を　誘う　暗示を　かけて 相手を　眠り状態に　する。
description_zh: 施以诱导睡意的暗示， 让对手陷入睡眠状态。
description_en: The user employs hypnotic suggestion to make the target fall asleep.
effect_en: Puts the target to sleep.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.

description_ja: 力を　ぬいて　体を　軽くして 高速で　動く。 自分の　素早さを　ぐーんと　あげる。
description_zh: 让身体放松变得轻盈， 以便高速移动。 大幅提高自己的速度。
description_en: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply boosts its Speed stat.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

description_ja: 目にも　留まらぬ　ものすごい　速さで 相手に　つっこむ。 必ず　先制攻撃　できる。
description_zh: 以迅雷不及掩耳之势扑向对手。 必定能够先制攻击。
description_en: The user lunges at the target to inflict damage, moving at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Every time the user is hit after it uses this move but before its next action, its Attack raises by one stage.

description_ja: ひかえの　ポケモンが　いるときに 使うと　入れ替わる。 野生の　ポケモンは　逃げてしまう。
description_zh: 当有后备宝可梦在时， 如果使用就可以进行替换。 野生的宝可梦会逃走。
description_en: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting, if any. If a wild Pokémon uses this move, it flees.
effect_en: Does nothing.  Wild battles end immediately.

description_ja: 恐ろしい　幻を　みせて 自分の　レベルと　同じだけの ダメージを　相手に　与える。
description_zh: 显示恐怖幻影， 只给予对手 和自己等级相同的伤害。
description_en: The user makes the target see a frightening mirage. It inflicts damage equal to the user's level.
effect_en: Inflicts damage equal to the user’s level.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.

description_ja: 相手が　最後に　使った　技を 戦闘の　あいだ 自分の　技に　することが　できる。
description_zh: 可以将对手 最后使用的招式， 在战斗内变成自己的招式。
description_en: The user copies the move last used by the target. The copied move can be used until the user of Mimic leaves the battle.
effect_en: This move is replaced by the target’s last successfully used move, and its PP changes to 5.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if the user already knows the targeted move, this move will fail.  This effect vanishes when the user leaves the field.  If chatter, metronome, mimic, sketch, or struggle is selected, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.

description_ja: おもわず　耳を　ふさぎたくなる いやなおとを　だして 相手の　防御を　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 发出不由自主想要 捂起耳朵的刺耳声， 从而大幅降低对手的防御。
description_en: An earsplitting screech harshly lowers the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Defense by two stages.

description_ja: 素早い　動きで　分身を　つくり 相手を　まどわせて 回避率を　あげる。
description_zh: 通过快速移动来制造分身， 扰乱对手，从而提高闪避率。
description_en: By moving rapidly, the user makes illusory copies of itself to boost its evasiveness.
effect_en: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

description_ja: 細胞を　再生させて 自分の　最大ＨＰの 半分の　ＨＰを　回復する。
description_zh: 让细胞再生， 从而回复自己 最大ＨＰ的一半。
description_en: The user regenerates its cells, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.
effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.

description_ja: 全身に　力を　こめて 体を　硬くして 自分の　防御を　あげる。
description_zh: 全身使劲，让身体变硬， 从而提高自己的防御。
description_en: The user stiffens all the muscles in its body to boost its Defense stat.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 体を　ちぢめて　小さく　みせて 自分の　回避率を ぐーんと　あげる。
description_zh: 蜷缩身体显得很小， 从而大幅提高 自己的闪避率。
description_en: The user compresses its body to make itself look smaller, which sharply boosts its evasiveness.
effect_en: Raises the user’s evasion by two stages.  stomp and steamroller have double power against Pokémon that have used this move since entering the field.

description_ja: 煙や　墨などを　吹きかけて 相手の　命中率を　さげる。
description_zh: 向对手喷出烟或墨汁等， 从而降低对手的命中率。
description_en: The user releases an obscuring cloud of smoke or ink. This lowers the target's accuracy.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s accuracy by one stage.

description_ja: 怪しい　光を 相手に　みせて　まどわせる。 相手を　混乱させる。
description_zh: 显示奇怪的光， 扰乱对手。 使对手混乱。
description_en: The target is exposed to a sinister ray that causes confusion.
effect_en: Confuses the target.

description_ja: 殻に　潜りこんで　身を守り 自分の　防御を　あげる。
description_zh: 缩入壳里保护身体， 从而提高自己的防御。
description_en: The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, boosting its Defense stat.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 体を　まるめて　ちぢこまり 自分の　防御を　あげる。
description_zh: 将身体蜷曲变圆， 从而提高自己的防御。
description_en: The user curls up and boosts its Defense stat.
effect_en: Raises user’s Defense by one stage.  After this move is used, the power of ice ball and rollout are doubled until the user leaves the field.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Defense by two stages.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　不思議な　かべで 相手から　受ける　特殊攻撃の ダメージを　弱める。
description_zh: 利用神奇的墙壁， 在５回合内减弱从对手那里 受到的特殊攻击的伤害。
description_en: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from special moves for five turns.
effect_en: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from special attacks by half for five turns.  In double battles, the reduction is 1/3.  Critical hits are not affected by the barrier.  If the user is holding light clay, the barrier lasts for eight turns.  brick break or defog used by an opponent will destroy the barrier.

description_ja: 黒い霧を　だして　戦闘に でている　ポケモン　全員の 能力変化を　もとに　もどす。
description_zh: 升起黑雾，将正在场上战斗的 全体宝可梦的能力变回原点。
description_en: The user creates a haze that eliminates every stat change among all the Pokémon engaged in battle.
effect_en: Removes stat, accuracy, and evasion modifiers from every Pokémon on the field.  This does not count as a stat reduction for the purposes of clear body or white smoke.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　不思議な　かべで 相手から　受ける　物理攻撃の ダメージを　弱める。
description_zh: 利用神奇的墙壁， 在５回合内减弱从对手那里 受到的物理攻击的伤害。
description_en: A wondrous wall of light is put up to reduce damage from physical moves for five turns.
effect_en: Erects a barrier around the user’s side of the field that reduces damage from physical attacks by half for five turns.  In double battles, the reduction is 1/3.  Critical hits are not affected by the barrier.  If the user is holding light clay, the barrier lasts for eight turns.  brick break or defog used by an opponent will destroy the barrier.

description_ja: 深く　息を　吸い　気合を　こめる。 自分の　攻撃が 急所に　当たりやすくなる。
description_zh: 深深地吸口气，集中精神。 自己的攻击 会变得容易击中要害。
description_en: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that its future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits.
effect_en: User’s critical hit rate is two levels higher until it leaves the field.  If the user has already used focus energy since entering the field, this move will fail.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: User waits for two turns.  On the second turn, the user inflicts twice the damage it accumulated on the last Pokémon to hit it.  Damage inflicted is typeless.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: 指をふり　自分の　脳を　刺激して すべての　技の　なかから どれか　１つを　くりだす。
description_zh: 挥动手指刺激自己的大脑， 从所有的招式中 任意使出１个。
description_en: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.
effect_en: Selects any move at random and uses it.  Moves the user already knows are not eligible.  Assist, meta, protection, and reflection moves are also not eligible; specifically, assist, chatter, copycat, counter, covet, destiny bond, detect, endure, feint, focus punch, follow me, helping hand, me first, metronome, mimic, mirror coat, mirror move, protect, quick guard, sketch, sleep talk, snatch, struggle, switcheroo, thief, trick, and wide guard will not be selected by this move.  This move cannot be copied by mimic or mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Uses the last move targeted at the user by a Pokémon still on the field.  A move counts as targeting the user even if it hit multiple Pokémon, as long as the user was one of them; however, moves targeting the field itself do not count.  If the user has not been targeted by an appropriate move since entering the field, or if no Pokémon that targeted the user remains on the field, this move will fail.  Moves that failed, missed, had no effect, or were blocked are still copied.  Assist moves, time-delayed moves, “meta” moves that operate on other moves/Pokémon/abilities, and some other special moves cannot be copied and are ignored; if the last move to hit the user was such a move, the previous move will be used instead.  The full list of ignored moves is: acid armor, acupressure, after you, agility, ally switch, amnesia, aqua ring, aromatherapy, aromatic mist, assist, autotomize, barrier, baton pass, belch, belly drum, bide, bulk up, calm mind, camouflage, celebrate, charge, coil, conversion, conversion 2, copycat, cosmic power, cotton guard, counter, crafty shield, curse, defend order, defense curl, destiny bond, detect, doom desire, double team, dragon dance, electric terrain, endure, final gambit, flower shield, focus energy, focus punch, follow me, future sight, geomancy, grassy terrain, gravity, growth, grudge, guard split, hail, happy hour, harden, haze, heal bell, heal order, heal pulse, healing wish, helping hand, hold hands, hone claws, howl, imprison, ingrain, ion deluge, iron defense, kings shield, light screen, lucky chant, lunar dance, magic coat, magnet rise, magnetic flux, mat block, me first, meditate, metronome, milk drink, mimic, minimize, mirror coat, mirror move, mist, misty terrain, moonlight, morning sun, mud sport, nasty plot, nature power, perish song, power split, power trick, protect, psych up, quick guard, quiver dance, rage powder, rain dance, recover, recycle, reflect, reflect type, refresh, rest, rock polish, role play, roost, rototiller, safeguard, sandstorm, shadow blast, shadow bolt, shadow half, shadow rush, shadow shed, shadow sky, shadow storm, shadow wave, sharpen, shell smash, shift gear, sketch, slack off, sleep talk, snatch, soft boiled, spikes, spiky shield, spit up, splash, stealth rock, sticky web, stockpile, struggle, substitute, sunny day, swallow, swords dance, synthesis, tail glow, tailwind, teleport, toxic spikes, transform, water sport, wide guard, wish, withdraw and work up.  This move cannot be selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk, nor forced by encore.

effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.
