description_en: The user throws the bone it holds. The bone loops around to hit the target twice—coming and going.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.

description_ja: ２ターンの　間　眠り続ける。 自分の　ＨＰと　状態異常を すべて　回復する。
description_zh: 连续睡上２回合。 回复自己的全部ＨＰ 以及治愈所有异常状态。
description_en: The user goes to sleep for two turns. This fully restores the user's HP and cures any status conditions.
effect_en: User falls to sleep and immediately regains all its HP.  If the user has another major status effect, sleep will replace it.  The user will always wake up after two turns, or one turn with early bird.  This move fails if the Pokémon cannot fall asleep due to uproar, insomnia, or vital spirit.  It also fails if the Pokémon is at full health or is already asleep.

description_ja: 大きな　岩を 激しく　ぶつけて　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 将大岩石 猛烈地撞向对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: Large boulders are hurled at opposing Pokémon to inflict damage. This may also make the opposing Pokémon flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: 鋭い　前歯で 強く　かみついて　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 用锋利的门牙 牢牢地咬住对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user bites hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage.

description_ja: 自分の　タイプを おぼえている　技で　一番　上の 技と　同じ　タイプに　する。
description_zh: 将自己的属性转换成 和已学会的招式中 第一个招式相同的属性。
description_en: The user changes its type to become the same type as the move at the top of the list of moves it knows.
effect_en: User’s type changes to the type of one of its moves, selected at random.  hidden power and weather ball are treated as normal.  Only moves with a different type are eligible, and curse is never eligible.  If the user has no suitable moves, this move will fail.

description_ja: ３つの　光線で　攻撃する。 まひか　やけどか　こおり状態の どれかに　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用３种光线进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入 麻痹、灼伤或冰冻的状态。
description_en: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 20% chance to burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.  One of these effects is selected at random; they do not each have independent chances to occur.

description_ja: 鋭い　前歯で 激しく　かみついて　攻撃する。 相手の　ＨＰは　半分に　なる。
description_zh: 用锋利的门牙 猛烈地咬住对手进行攻击。 对手的ＨＰ减半。
description_en: The user chomps hard on the target with its sharp front fangs. This cuts the target's HP in half.
effect_en: Inflicts typeless damage equal to half the target’s remaining HP.

description_ja: ツメや　カマなどで 相手を　切り裂いて　攻撃する。 急所に　当たりやすい。
description_zh: 用爪子或镰刀等 劈开对手进行攻击。 容易击中要害。
description_en: The target is attacked with a slash of claws, scythes, or the like. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰを　少し　削って 分身を　だす。 分身は　自分の　身代わりに　なる。
description_zh: 削减少许自己的ＨＰ， 制造分身。 分身将成为自己的替身。
description_en: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its own HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.
effect_en: Transfers 1/4 the user’s max HP into a doll that absorbs damage and causes most negative move effects to fail.  If the user leaves the field, the doll will vanish.  If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail.  The doll takes damage as normal, using the user’s stats and types, and will break when its HP reaches zero.  Self-inflicted damage from confusion or recoil is not absorbed.  Healing effects from opponents ignore the doll and heal the user as normal.  Moves that work based on the user’s HP still do so; the doll’s HP does not influence any move.  The doll will block major status effects, confusion, and flinching.  The effects of smelling salts and wake up slap do not trigger against a doll, even if the Pokémon behind the doll has the appropriate major status effect.  Multi-turn trapping moves like wrap will hit the doll for their regular damage, but the multi-turn trapping and damage effects will not activate.  Moves blocked or damage absorbed by the doll do not count as hitting the user or inflicting damage for any effects that respond to such, e.g., avalanche, counter, or a rowap berry.  magic coat still works as normal, even against moves the doll would block.  Opposing Pokémon that damage the doll with a leech move like absorb are healed as normal.  It will also block acupressure, block, the curse effect of curse, dream eater, embargo, flatter, gastro acid, grudge, heal block, leech seed, lock on, mean look, mimic, mind reader, nightmare, pain split, psycho shift, spider web, sketch, swagger, switcheroo, trick, worry seed, and yawn.  A Pokémon affected by yawn before summoning the doll will still fall to sleep.  The doll blocks intimidate, but all other abilities act as though the doll did not exist.  If the user has an ability that absorbs moves of a certain type for HP (such as volt absorb absorbing thunder wave), such moves will not be blocked.  life orb and berries that cause confusion still work as normal, but their respective HP loss and confusion are absorbed/blocked by the doll.  The user is still vulnerable to damage inflicted when entering or leaving the field, such as by pursuit or spikes; however, the doll will block the poison effect of toxic spikes.  The doll is passed on by baton pass.  It keeps its existing HP, but uses the replacement Pokémon’s stats and types for damage calculation.  All other effects work as normal.

description_ja: 自分の　ＰＰが　なくなると あがいて　相手を　攻撃する。 自分も　少し　ダメージを　受ける。
description_zh: 当自己的ＰＰ耗尽时， 努力挣扎攻击对手。 自己也会受到少许伤害。
description_en: This attack is used in desperation only if the user has no PP. It also damages the user a little.
effect_en: Inflicts typeless regular damage.  User takes 1/4 its max HP in recoil.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move is used automatically when a Pokémon cannot use any other move legally, e.g., due to having no PP remaining or being under the effect of both encore and torment at the same time.  This move’s recoil is not treated as recoil for the purposes of anything that affects recoil, such as the ability rock head.  It also is not prevented by magic guard.  This move cannot be copied by mimic, mirror move, or sketch, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.

description_ja: 相手が　使った　技を 自分の　ものに　する。 １回　使うと　スケッチは　消える。
description_zh: 将对手使用的招式 变成自己的招式。 使用１次后写生消失。
description_en: This move enables the user to permanently learn the move last used by the target. Once used, Sketch disappears.
effect_en: Permanently replaces itself with the target’s last used move.  If that move is chatter or struggle, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mimic or mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome, nor forced by encore.

description_ja: ３回連続で　キックを　くりだして 攻撃する。　技が　当たるたびに 威力は　あがる。
description_zh: 连续３次踢对手进行攻击。 每踢中一次，威力就会提高。
description_en: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits three times in the same turn.  The second hit has double power, and the third hit has triple power.  Each hit has a separate accuracy check, and this move stops if a hit misses.  skill link does not apply.

description_ja: 攻撃と　同時に　道具を　盗む。 自分が　道具を　持っている　場合は 盗めない。
description_zh: 攻击的同时盗取道具。 当自己携带道具时， 不会去盗取。
description_en: The user attacks and steals the target's held item simultaneously. The user can't steal anything if it already holds an item.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is holding an item and the user is not, the user will permanently take the item.  Damage is still inflicted if an item cannot be taken.  Pokémon with sticky hold or multitype are immune to the item theft effect.  The target cannot recover its item with recycle.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: The target cannot switch out normally.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect ends when the user leaves the field.  The target may still escape by using baton pass, u turn, or a shed shell.  Both the user and the target pass on this effect with baton pass.

description_ja: 相手の　動きを　心で　感じて 次の　攻撃が　必ず 相手に　当たるように　する。
description_zh: 用心感受对手的行动， 下次攻击必定 会击中对手。
description_en: The user senses the target’s movements with its mind to ensure its next attack does not miss the target.
effect_en: If the user targets the same target again before the end of the next turn, the move it uses is guaranteed to hit.  This move itself also ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  One-hit KO moves are also guaranteed to hit, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  This effect also allows the user to hit Pokémon that are off the field due to moves such as dig or fly.  If the target uses detect or protect while under the effect of this move, the user is not guaranteed to hit, but has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Only works on sleeping Pokémon.  Gives the target a nightmare, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP every turn.  If the target wakes up or leaves the field, this effect ends.

description_ja: 炎を　まとい 相手に　突進して　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 让火焰覆盖全身， 猛撞向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The user attacks by cloaking itself in fire and charging at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.  Frozen Pokémon may use this move, in which case they will thaw.

description_ja: 自分が　寝ているときに 雑音を　だして　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 在自己睡觉时， 发出噪音进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: This attack can be used only if the user is asleep. The harsh noise may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: 使う　ポケモンが ゴーストタイプと　それ以外　とでは 効果が　変わる。
description_zh: 使用该招式的宝可梦， 其属性是幽灵属性或其他属性时， 效果会不一样。
description_en: A move that has different effects depending on whether the user is a Ghost type or not.
effect_en: If the user is a ghost: user pays half its max HP to place a curse on the target, damaging it for 1/4 its max HP every turn. Otherwise: Lowers the user’s Speed by one stage, and raises its Attack and Defense by one stage each.  The curse effect is passed on by baton pass.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: じたばた　暴れて　攻撃する。 自分の　ＨＰが　少ないほど 技の　威力は　あがる。
description_zh: 抓狂般乱打进行攻击。 自己的ＨＰ越少， 招式的威力越大。
description_en: The user flails about aimlessly to attack. The less HP the user has, the greater the move's power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.  64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----:  0– 1                    |  200  2– 5                    |  150  6–12                    |  100 13–21                    |   80 22–42                    |   40 43–64                    |   20

description_ja: 相手が　最後に　使った技に 抵抗できる　ように 自分の　タイプを　変化させる。
description_zh: 为了可以抵抗对手 最后使用的招式， 从而使自己的属性发生变化。
description_en: The user changes its type to make itself resistant to the type of the move the target used last.
effect_en: Changes the user’s type to a type either resistant or immune to the last damaging move that hit it.  The new type is selected at random and cannot be a type the user already is.  If there is no eligible new type, this move will fail.

description_ja: 空気の　渦を 発射して　攻撃する。 急所に　当たりやすい。
description_zh: 发射空气旋涡 进行攻击。 容易击中要害。
description_en: A vortex of air is shot at the target to inflict damage. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

description_ja: 綿のような　フワフワの　胞子を まとわり　つかせて 相手の　素早さを　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 将棉花般柔软的孢子 紧贴对手， 从而大幅降低对手的速度。
description_en: The user releases cotton-like spores that cling to opposing Pokémon. This harshly lowers their Speed stats.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

description_ja: 力を　ふりしぼり　攻撃する。 自分の　ＨＰが　少ないほど 技の　威力は　あがる。
description_zh: 竭尽全力进行攻击。 自己的ＨＰ越少， 招式的威力越大。
description_en: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power varies inversely with the user’s proportional remaining HP.  64 * current HP / max HP | Power -----------------------: | ----:  0– 1                    |  200  2– 5                    |  150  6–12                    |  100 13–21                    |   80 22–42                    |   40 43–64                    |   20

description_ja: 相手が　最後に　使った技に 恨みを　抱いて その技の　ＰＰを　４だけ　減らす。
description_zh: 对对手最后使用的招式 怀有怨恨， 减少４ＰＰ该招式。
description_en: The user unleashes its grudge on the move last used by the target by cutting 4 PP from it.
effect_en: Lowers the PP of the target’s last used move by 4.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, or if its last used move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.

description_ja: 冷たい　粉雪を 相手に　吹きつけて　攻撃する。 こおり状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 将冰冷的细雪 吹向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入冰冻状态。
description_en: The user attacks with a chilling gust of powdery snow. This may also leave opposing Pokémon frozen.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

description_ja: 相手の　攻撃を まったく　受けない。 連続で　だすと　失敗しやすい。
description_zh: 完全抵挡 对手的攻击。 连续使出则容易失败。
description_en: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
effect_en: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move.  This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move.  thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move.  The following effects are not prevented by this move:  * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 目にも　留まらぬ　ものすごい　速さで パンチを　くりだす。 必ず　先制攻撃　できる。
description_zh: 以迅雷不及掩耳之势出拳。 必定能够先制攻击。
description_en: The user throws a punch at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 恐ろしい　顔で　にらみ　おびえさせて 相手の　素早さを　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 用恐怖的表情瞪着对手， 使其害怕， 从而大幅降低对手的速度。
description_en: The user frightens the target with a scary face to harshly lower its Speed stat.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Speed by two stages.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

description_ja: 天使のように　かわいく　キスして 相手を　混乱させる。
description_zh: 像天使般可爱地亲吻对手， 从而使对手混乱。
description_en: The user kisses the target with a sweet, angelic cuteness that causes confusion.
effect_en: Confuses the target.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰを　最大ＨＰの 半分　減らして　自分の　攻撃を 最大に　あげる。
description_zh: 将自己的ＨＰ减少到 最大ＨＰ的一半， 从而最大限度提高自己的攻击。
description_en: The user maximizes its Attack stat but loses HP equal to half its max HP.
effect_en: User pays half its max HP to raise its Attack to +6 stages.  If the user cannot pay the HP cost, this move will fail.

description_ja: 汚い　ヘドロを 相手に　投げつけて　攻撃する。 毒状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用污泥投掷对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入中毒状态。
description_en: The user hurls unsanitary sludge at the target to inflict damage. This may also poison the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to poison the target.

description_ja: 相手の　顔などに 泥を　投げつけて　攻撃する。 命中率を　さげる。
description_zh: 向对手的脸等 投掷泥块进行攻击。 会降低对手的命中率。
description_en: The user hurls mud in the target's face to inflict damage and lower its accuracy.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

description_ja: 相手の　顔などに 墨を　吹きかけて　攻撃する。 命中率を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手的脸等 喷出墨汁进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的命中率。
description_en: The user attacks by spraying ink in the target’s face or eyes. This may also lower the target’s accuracy.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

description_ja: 相手の　足下に　まきびしを しかける。交代で　でてきた　相手の ポケモンに　ダメージを　与える。
description_zh: 在对手的脚下扔撒菱。 对替换出场的对手的宝可梦 给予伤害。
description_en: The user lays a trap of spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will damage opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.
effect_en: Scatters spikes around the opposing field, which damage opposing Pokémon that enter the field for 1/8 of their max HP.  Pokémon immune to ground moves are immune to this damage, except during gravity.  Up to three layers of spikes may be laid down, adding 1/16 to the damage done: two layers of spikes damage for 3/16 max HP, and three layers damage for 1/4 max HP.  wonder guard does not block damage from this effect.  rapid spin removes this effect from its user’s side of the field.  defog removes this effect from its target’s side of the field.

description_ja: 大砲の　ような 電気を　発射して　攻撃する。 相手を　まひの　状態に　する。
description_zh: 发射大炮一样的 电流进行攻击。 让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user attacks by firing an electric blast like a cannon. This also leaves the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Resets the target’s evasion to normal and prevents any further boosting until the target leaves the field.  A ghost under this effect takes normal damage from normal and fighting moves.  This move itself ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

description_ja: 技のあと　相手の　攻撃で　ひんしに なると　攻撃　相手も　ひんしにする。 連続して　出すと　失敗する。
description_zh: 使出招式后，当受到对手攻击 陷入濒死时，对手也会一同濒死。 连续使出则会失败。
description_en: If the user is knocked out after using this move, the Pokémon that knocked it out will also faint. This move's chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
effect_en: If the user faints before its next move, the Pokémon that fainted it will automatically faint.  End-of-turn damage is ignored.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 歌を　聴いた　ポケモンは ３ターン　たつと　ひんしに　なる。 交代すると　効果は　なくなる。
description_zh: 倾听歌声的宝可梦 经过３回合陷入濒死。 替换后效果消失。
description_en: Any Pokémon that hears this song faints in three turns, unless it switches out of battle.
effect_en: Every Pokémon is given a counter that starts at 3 and decreases by 1 at the end of every turn, including this one.  When a Pokémon’s counter reaches zero, that Pokémon faints.  A Pokémon that leaves the field will lose its counter; its replacement does not inherit the effect, and other Pokémon’s counters remain.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: 凍てつく　冷気を 相手に　吹きつけて　攻撃する。 相手の　素早さを　さげる。
description_zh: 将结冰的冷气 吹向对手进行攻击。 会降低对手的速度。
description_en: The user attacks with a gust of chilled air. This also lowers opposing Pokémon's Speed stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

description_ja: 相手の　攻撃を まったく　受けない。 連続で　だすと　失敗しやすい。
description_zh: 完全抵挡 对手的攻击。 连续使出则容易失败。
description_en: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
effect_en: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move.  This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move.  thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move.  The following effects are not prevented by this move:  * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 硬い　ホネで 相手を　なぐりつけて　攻撃する。 ２ー５回の　間　連続で　だす。
description_zh: 用坚硬的骨头 殴打对手进行攻击。 连续攻击２～５次。
description_en: The user attacks by striking the target with a hard bone. This move hits two to five times in a row.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.

description_ja: 照準を　しっかり　あわせて 次の　攻撃が　必ず 相手に　当たるように　する。
description_zh: 紧紧瞄准对手， 下次攻击必定会打中。
description_en: The user takes sure aim at the target. This ensures the user's next move does not miss that target.
effect_en: If the user targets the same target again before the end of the next turn, the move it uses is guaranteed to hit.  This move itself also ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  One-hit KO moves are also guaranteed to hit, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  This effect also allows the user to hit Pokémon that are off the field due to moves such as dig or fly.  If the target uses detect or protect while under the effect of this move, the user is not guaranteed to hit, but has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  This effect is passed on by baton pass.

description_ja: ２ー３ターンの　間 暴れまくって　攻撃する。 暴れたあとは　混乱する。
description_zh: 在２～３回合内， 乱打一气地进行攻击。 大闹一番后自己会陷入混乱。
description_en: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to attack with this move for 2–3 turns,selected at random.  After the last hit, the user becomes confused.  safeguard does not protect against the confusion from this move.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　砂あらしで　いわ じめん　はがねタイプ　以外に　ダメージ。 いわタイプの　特防が　あがる。
description_zh: 在５回合内扬起沙暴，除岩石、地面和 钢属性以外的宝可梦，都会受到伤害。 岩石属性的特防还会提高。
description_en: A five-turn sandstorm is summoned to damage all Pokémon except Rock, Ground, and Steel types. The sandstorm also boosts the Sp. Def stats of Rock types.
effect_en: Changes the weather to a sandstorm for five turns.  Pokémon that are not ground, rock, or steel take 1/16 their max HP at the end of every turn.  Every rock Pokémon’s original Special Defense is raised by 50% for the duration of this effect.  solar beam’s power is halved.  moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis only heal 1/4 the user’s max HP.

description_ja: 養分を　吸い取り　攻撃する。 与えた　ダメージの 半分の　ＨＰを　回復できる。
description_zh: 吸取对手的养分进行攻击。 可以回复给予对手 伤害的一半ＨＰ。
description_en: A nutrient-draining attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Drains half the damage inflicted to heal the user.

description_ja: 攻撃を　受けても ＨＰを　必ず　１だけ　残せる。 連続で　だすと　失敗しやすい。
description_zh: 即使受到攻击， 也至少会留下１ＨＰ。 连续使出则容易失败。
description_en: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. This move's chance of failing rises if used in succession.
effect_en: The user’s HP cannot be lowered below 1 by any means for the remainder of this turn.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: かわいく　みつめて　油断を　誘い 相手の　攻撃を　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 可爱地凝视， 诱使对手疏忽大意， 从而大幅降低对手的攻击。
description_en: The user gazes at the target rather charmingly, making it less wary. This harshly lowers the target's Attack stat.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　転がり続けて 攻撃する。　技が　当たるたびに 威力が　あがる。
description_zh: 在５回合内连续滚动攻击对手。 招式每次击中，威力就会提高。
description_en: The user continually rolls into the target over five turns. This attack becomes more powerful each time it hits.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for five turns.  Power doubles every time this move is used in succession to a maximum of 16x, and resets to normal after the lock-in ends.  If this move misses or becomes unusable, the lock-in ends.  If the user has used defense curl since entering the field, this move has double power.

description_ja: 相手の　ＨＰが 必ず　１だけ　残るように 手加減して　攻撃する。
description_zh: 对手的ＨＰ 至少会留下１ＨＰ， 如此般手下留情地攻击。
description_en: A restrained attack that prevents the target from fainting. The target is left with at least 1 HP.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Will not reduce the target’s HP below 1.

description_ja: 相手を　怒らせて　混乱させる。 怒りで　相手の　攻撃は ぐーんと　あがってしまう。
description_zh: 激怒对手，使其混乱。 因为愤怒，对手的攻击 会大幅提高。
description_en: The user enrages and confuses the target. However, this also sharply boosts the target's Attack stat.
effect_en: Raises the target’s Attack by two stages, then confuses it.  If the target’s Attack cannot be raised by two stages, the confusion is not applied.

description_ja: 最大ＨＰの　半分 自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。
description_zh: 回复自己最大ＨＰ的一半。
description_en: The user restores its own HP by up to half its max HP.
effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.

description_ja: 電気を　まとい 相手に　突進して　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 让电流覆盖全身， 猛撞向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user attacks the target with an electrically charged tackle. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: カマや　ツメなどで　相手を 切りつけて　攻撃する。 連続で　当てると　威力が　あがる。
description_zh: 用镰刀或爪子等 切斩对手进行攻击。 连续击中，威力就会提高。
description_en: The user attacks by slashing the target with scythes, claws, or the like. This attack becomes more powerful if it hits in succession.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power doubles after every time this move is used, whether consecutively or not, maxing out at 16x.  If this move misses or the user leaves the field, power resets.

description_ja: 硬い　翼を　相手に　たたきつけて 攻撃する。　自分の　防御が あがることが　ある。
description_zh: 用坚硬的翅膀敲打 对手进行攻击。 有时会提高自己的防御。
description_en: The target is hit with wings of steel. This may also boost the user's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage. Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Defense one stage.

description_ja: 吸いこまれるような　黒い　まなざしで じっと　みつめて　相手を 戦闘から　逃げられなくする。
description_zh: 用好似要勾人心魂的黑色目光 一动不动地凝视对手， 使其不能从战斗中逃走。
description_en: The user pins the target with a dark, arresting look. The target becomes unable to flee.
effect_en: The target cannot switch out normally.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect ends when the user leaves the field.  The target may still escape by using baton pass, u turn, or a shed shell.  Both the user and the target pass on this effect with baton pass.

description_ja: ♂なら♀を　♀なら♂を　誘惑して メロメロに　する。 相手は　技が　だしにくくなる。
description_zh: ♂诱惑♀或♀诱惑♂， 让对手着迷。 对手将很难使出招式。
description_en: If the target is of the opposite gender to the user, it becomes infatuated with the user and will sometimes be unable to use its moves.
effect_en: Causes the target to fall in love with the user, giving it a 50% chance to do nothing each turn.  If the user and target are the same gender, or either is genderless, this move will fail.  If either Pokémon leaves the field, this effect ends.

description_ja: 自分が　おぼえている　技の　うち どれか　１つを　くりだす。 自分が　寝ているときだけ　使える。
description_zh: 从自己已学会的招式中 任意使出１个。 只能在自己睡觉时使用。
description_en: The user randomly uses one of the moves it knows. This move can only be used while the user is asleep.
effect_en: Only usable if the user is sleeping.  Randomly selects and uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Use of the selected move requires and costs 0 PP.  This move will not select assist, bide, bounce, chatter, copycat, dig, dive, fly, focus punch, me first, metronome, mirror move, shadow force, skull bash, sky attack, sky drop, sleep talk, solar beam, razor wind, or uproar.  If the selected move requires a recharge turn—i.e., one of blast burn, frenzy plant, giga impact, hydro cannon, hyper beam, roar of time, or rock wrecker—and the user is still sleeping next turn, then it’s forced to use this move again and pay another PP for the recharge turn.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.

description_ja: 心地好い　鈴の　音色を　聞かせて 味方　全員の 状態異常を　回復　する。
description_zh: 让同伴听舒适的铃音， 从而治愈我方全员的异常状态。
description_en: The user makes a soothing bell chime to cure the status conditions of all its fellow party Pokémon and allies.
effect_en: Removes major status effects and confusion from every Pokémon in the user’s party.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with happiness, given by `happiness * 2 / 5`, to a maximum of 102.  Power bottoms out at 1.

description_ja: わなを　しかけた　箱を 相手に　わたして　攻撃する。ＨＰが 回復して　しまうことも　ある。
description_zh: 递给对手设有圈套的 盒子进行攻击。 也有可能回复对手ＨＰ。
description_en: The user attacks by giving the target a gift with a hidden trap. The gift restores HP sometimes, however.
effect_en: Randomly uses one of the following effects.  Effect                                             | Chance -------------------------------------------------- | -----: Inflicts regular damage with 40 power  |    40% Inflicts regular damage with 80 power  |    30% Inflicts regular damage with 120 power |    10% Heals the target for 1/4 its max HP    |    20%  On average, this move inflicts regular damage with 52 power and heals the target for 1/20 its max HP.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases inversely with happiness, given by `(255 - happiness) * 2 / 5`, to a maximum of 102.  Power bottoms out at 1.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間 不思議な　力に　守られて 状態異常に　ならなくなる。
description_zh: 在５回合内 被神奇的力量守护， 从而不会陷入异常状态。
description_en: The user creates a protective field that prevents status conditions for five turns.
effect_en: Protects Pokémon on the user’s side of the field from major status effects and confusion for five turns.  Does not cancel existing ailments.  This effect remains even if the user leaves the field.  If yawn is used while this move is in effect, it will immediately fail.  defog used by an opponent will end this effect.  This effect does not prevent the confusion caused by outrage, petal dance, or thrash.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰと　相手の　ＨＰを あわせて　それを　自分と　相手で なかよく　わける。
description_zh: 将自己的ＨＰ和 对手的ＨＰ相加， 然后自己和对手友好地平分。
description_en: The user adds its HP to the target's HP, then equally splits the combined HP between the target and itself.
effect_en: Changes the user’s and target’s remaining HP to the average of their current remaining HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This effect does not count as inflicting damage for other moves and effects that respond to damage taken.  This effect fails against a substitute.

description_ja: 神秘の　炎で 相手を　焼きつくして　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 用神秘的火焰 烧尽对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The target is razed with a mystical fire of great intensity. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to burn the target.  Frozen Pokémon may use this move, in which case they will thaw.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is selected at random between 10 and 150, with an average of 71:  Magnitude | Power | Chance --------: | ----: | -----:         4 |    10 |     5%         5 |    30 |    10%         6 |    50 |    20%         7 |    70 |    30%         8 |    90 |    20%         9 |   110 |    10%        10 |   150 |     5%  This move has double power against Pokémon currently underground due to dig.

description_ja: こん身の　力で パンチを　くりだして　攻撃する。 相手を　必ず　混乱させる。
description_zh: 使出浑身力气出拳进行攻击。 必定会使对手混乱。
description_en: The user attacks by punching the target with full concentrated power. This also confuses the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to confuse the target.

description_ja: 硬くて　りっぱな　つので　おもいっきり 相手を　突き刺して　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用坚硬且华丽的角狠狠地 刺入对手进行攻击。
description_en: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ものすごい　息を 相手に　吹きつけて　攻撃する。 まひ状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 将强烈的气息 吹向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入麻痹状态。
description_en: The user exhales a mighty gust that inflicts damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to paralyze the target.

description_ja: 控えの　ポケモンと　入れ替わる。 能力変化は　替わった ポケモンが　そのまま　受けつぐ。
description_zh: 和后备宝可梦进行替换。 换上的宝可梦能直接继承 其能力的变化。
description_en: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.
effect_en: User switches out, and the trainer selects a replacement Pokémon from the party.  Stat changes, confusion, and persistent move effects are passed along to the replacement Pokémon.  The following move effects are passed:  * aqua ring * both the user’s and target’s effect of block, mean look, and spider web * the curse effect of curse * embargo * focus energy or an activated lansat berry * gastro acid * ingrain * being sapped by leech seed * being targeted by lock on or mind reader * magnet rise * perish song’s counter * power trick * substitute; the doll’s HP is unchanged  The replacement Pokémon does not trigger effects that respond to Pokémon switching in.

description_ja: 相手に　アンコールした　技を ３回　続けて　出させる。
description_zh: 让对手接受再来一次， 连续３次使出最后使用的招式。
description_en: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.
effect_en: The next 4–8 times (selected at random) the target attempts to move, it is forced to repeat its last used move.  If the selected move allows the trainer to select a target, an opponent will be selected at random each turn.  If the target is prevented from using the selected move by some other effect, struggle will be used instead.  This effect ends if the selected move runs out of PP.  If the target hasn’t used a move since entering the field, if it tried to use a move this turn and failed, if it does not know the selected move, or if the selected move has 0 PP remaining, this move will fail.  If the target’s last used move was encore, mimic, mirror move, sketch, struggle, or transform, this move will fail.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target attempts to switch out this turn before the user acts, this move hits the target before it leaves and has double power.  This effect can still hit a Pokémon that switches out when it has a substitute up or when an ally has used follow me.

description_ja: 回転して　相手を　攻撃する。 しめつける　まきつく　やどりぎのタネ　など 吹きとばす。自分の　素早さも　あがる。
description_zh: 通过旋转来攻击对手。 可以摆脱绑紧、紧束、寄生种子 等招式。还能提高自己的速度。
description_en: The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Removes leech seed from the user, frees the user from bind, clamp, fire spin, magma storm, sand tomb, whirlpool, and wrap, and clears spikes, stealth rock, and toxic spikes from the user’s side of the field.  If this move misses or has no effect, its effect doesn’t activate.

description_ja: 香りで　相手の　回避率を がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 用香气大幅降低对手的闪避率。
description_en: The user releases a scent that harshly lowers opposing Pokémon's evasiveness.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s evasion by one stage.

description_ja: 硬い　しっぽで 相手を　たたきつけて　攻撃する。 相手の　防御を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 使用坚硬的尾巴 摔打对手进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的防御。
description_en: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 鋼鉄の　ツメで 相手を　切り裂いて　攻撃する。 自分の　攻撃が　あがることが　ある。
description_zh: 用钢铁之爪 劈开对手进行攻击。 有时会提高自己的攻击。
description_en: The target is raked with steel claws. This may also boost the user's Attack stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage. Has a 10% chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.

description_ja: 相手より　あとに　攻撃する。 そのかわり　自分の　攻撃は 必ず　命中する。
description_zh: 会在对手之后进行攻击。 但是自己的攻击必定会命中。
description_en: The user attacks last. In return, this throw move never misses.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。 天気に　よって 回復の　量が　変化する。
description_zh: 回复自己的ＨＰ。 根据天气的不同， 回复量也会有所变化。
description_en: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.
effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.  During sunny day, the healing is increased to 2/3 max HP.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, the healing is decreased to 1/4 max HP.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。 天気に　よって 回復の　量が　変化する。
description_zh: 回复自己的ＨＰ。 根据天气的不同， 回复量也会有所变化。
description_en: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.
effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.  During sunny day, the healing is increased to 2/3 max HP.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, the healing is decreased to 1/4 max HP.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。 天気に　よって 回復の　量が　変化する。
description_zh: 回复自己的ＨＰ。 根据天气的不同， 回复量也会有所变化。
description_en: The user restores its own HP. The amount of HP regained varies with the weather.
effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.  During sunny day, the healing is increased to 2/3 max HP.  During hail, rain dance, or sandstorm, the healing is decreased to 1/4 max HP.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power and type are determined by the user’s IVs.  Power is given by `x * 40 / 63 + 30`.  `x` is obtained by arranging bit 1 from the IV for each of Special Defense, Special Attack, Speed, Defense, Attack, and HP in that order.  (Bit 1 is 1 if the IV is of the form `4n + 2` or `4n + 3`.  `x` is then 64 * Special Defense IV bit 1, plus 32 * Special Attack IV bit 1, etc.)  Power is always between 30 and 70, inclusive.  Average power is 49.5.  Type is given by `y * 15 / 63`, where `y` is similar to `x` above, except constructed from bit 0.  (Bit 0 is 1 if the IV is odd.)  The result is looked up in the following table.  Value | Type ----: | --------     0 | fighting     1 | flying     2 | poison     3 | ground     4 | rock     5 | bug     6 | ghost     7 | steel     8 | fire     9 | water    10 | grass    11 | electric    12 | psychic    13 | ice    14 | dragon    15 | dark  This move thus cannot be normal.  Most other types have an equal 1/16 chance to be selected, given random IVs.  However, due to the flooring used here, bug, fighting, and grass appear 5/64 of the time, and dark only 1/64 of the time.

description_ja: 両手チョップを 相手に　たたきつけて　攻撃する。 急所に　当たりやすい。
description_zh: 用两手呈十字 劈打对手进行攻击。 容易击中要害。
description_en: The user delivers a double chop with its forearms crossed. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

description_ja: 竜巻を　おこして 相手を　まきこみ　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 兴起龙卷风， 将对手卷入进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user whips up a vicious tornado to tear at opposing Pokémon. This may also make them flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 20% chance to make each target flinch.  If the target is under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop, this move will hit with double power.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　雨を　降らせて みずタイプの　威力を　あげる。 ほのおタイプの　威力は　さがる。
description_zh: 在５回合内一直降雨， 从而提高水属性的招式威力。 火属性的招式威力则降低。
description_en: The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns, powering up Water-type attacks. The rain also lowers the power of Fire-type attacks.
effect_en: Changes the weather to rain for five turns, during which water moves inflict 50% extra damage, and fire moves inflict half damage.  If the user is holding damp rock, this effect lasts for eight turns.  thunder has 100% accuracy.  If the target has used detect or protect, thunder has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  solar beam has half power.  moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal only 1/4 of the user’s max HP.  Pokémon with swift swim have doubled original Speed.  Pokémon with forecast become water.  Pokémon with dry skin heal 1/8 max HP, Pokémon with hydration are cured of major status effects, and Pokémon with rain dish heal 1/16 max HP at the end of each turn.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　日差しを　強くして ほのおタイプの　威力を　あげる。 みずタイプの　威力は　さがる。
description_zh: 在５回合内让日照变得强烈， 从而提高火属性的招式威力。 水属性的招式威力则降低。
description_en: The user intensifies the sun for five turns, powering up Fire-type attacks. The sunlight also lowers the power of Water-type attacks.
effect_en: Changes the weather to sunshine for five turns, during which fire moves inflict 50% extra damage, and water moves inflict half damage.  If the user is holding heat rock, this effect lasts for eight turns.  Pokémon cannot become frozen.  thunder has 50% accuracy.  solar beam skips its charge turn.  moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal 2/3 of the user’s max HP.  Pokémon with chlorophyll have doubled original Speed.  Pokémon with forecast become fire.  Pokémon with leaf guard are not affected by major status effects.  Pokémon with flower gift change form; every Pokémon on their side of the field have their original Attack and Special Attack increased by 50%.  Pokémon with dry skin lose 1/8 max HP at the end of each turn.  Pokémon with solar power have their original Special Attack raised by 50% but lose 1/8 their max HP at the end of each turn.

description_ja: 鋭い　歯で 相手を　かみくだいて　攻撃する。 相手の　防御を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 用利牙咬碎对手进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 相手から　受けた　特殊攻撃の ダメージを　２倍に　して その相手に　返す。
description_zh: 从对手那里受到 特殊攻击的伤害将以 ２倍返还给同一个对手。
description_en: A retaliatory attack that counters any special move, inflicting double the damage taken.
effect_en: Targets the last opposing Pokémon to hit the user with a special move this turn.  Inflicts twice the damage that move did to the user.  If there is no eligible target, this move will fail.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 自分に　暗示を　かけることで 能力変化の　状態を 相手と　同じにする。
description_zh: 向自己施以自我暗示， 将能力变化的状态 变得和对手一样。
description_en: The user hypnotizes itself into copying any stat change made by the target.
effect_en: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: 目にも　留まらぬ　ものすごい　速さで 相手に　突進して　攻撃する。 必ず　先制攻撃　できる。
description_zh: 以迅雷不及掩耳之势 猛撞向对手进行攻击。 必定能够先制攻击。
description_en: The user charges the target at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 原始の　力で　攻撃する。 自分の　すべての 能力が　あがることが　ある。
description_zh: 用原始之力进行攻击。 有时会提高 自己所有的能力。
description_en: The user attacks with a prehistoric power. This may also boost all the user's stats at once.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage. Has a 10% chance to raise all of the user’s stats one stage.

description_ja: 黒い影の　塊を　投げつけて 攻撃する。　相手の　特防を さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 投掷一团黑影进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的特防。
description_en: The user attacks by hurling a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target’s Sp. Def stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 技を　使った　２ターン後に 相手に　念力の 塊を　送って　攻撃する。
description_zh: 在使用招式２回合后， 向对手发送一团念力进行攻击。
description_en: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.
effect_en: Inflicts typeless regular damage at the end of the third turn, starting with this one.  This move cannot score a critical hit.  If the target switches out, its replacement will be hit instead.  Damage is calculated at the time this move is used; stat changes and switching out during the delay won’t change the damage inflicted.  No move with this effect can be used against the same target again until after the end of the third turn.  This effect breaks through wonder guard.  If the target is protected by protect or detect on the turn this move is used, this move will fail.  However, the damage on the third turn will break through protection.  The damage is applied at the end of the turn, so it ignores endure and focus sash.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: パンチで　攻撃する。相手の 防御を　さげる　ことが　ある。
description_zh: 用拳头进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user attacks with a punch. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 激しく　渦をまく　水の中に ４ー５ターンの　間 相手を　閉じこめて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 将对手困在激烈的 水流旋涡中， 在４～５回合内进行攻击。
description_en: The user traps the target inside a violent, swirling whirlpool that inflicts damage for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  If the target is in the first turn of dive, this move will hit with double power.

description_ja: 味方　全員で　攻撃する。 仲間の　ポケモンが　多いほど 技の　攻撃回数が　増える。
description_zh: 我方全员进行攻击。 同行的宝可梦越多， 招式的攻击次数越多。
description_en: The user gets all party Pokémon to attack the target. The more party Pokémon, the greater the number of attacks.
effect_en: Inflicts typeless regular damage.  Every Pokémon in the user’s party, excepting those that have fainted or have a major status effect, attacks the target.  Calculated stats are ignored; the base stats for the target and assorted attackers are used instead.  The random factor in the damage formula is not used.  dark Pokémon still get STAB.  This effect breaks through wonder guard.

description_ja: 先制攻撃で　相手を　ひるませる。 戦闘に　でたら すぐに　ださないと　成功しない。
description_zh: 进行先制攻击，使对手畏缩。 要在出场后立刻使出才能成功。
description_en: This attack hits first and makes the target flinch. It works only on the first turn each time the user enters battle.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Causes the target to flinch.  Can only be used on the user’s first turn after entering the field.

description_ja: ３ターンの　間 騒いで　相手を　攻撃する。 そのあいだは　だれも　眠れなくなる。
description_zh: 在３回合内 用骚乱攻击对手。 在此期间谁都不能入眠。
description_en: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for 2–5 turns, selected at random.  All Pokémon on the field wake up, and none can fall to sleep until the lock-in ends.  Pokémon cannot use rest during this effect.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: 力を　蓄えて　自分の 防御と　特防を　あげる。 最大　３回まで　蓄えられる。
description_zh: 积蓄力量， 提高自己的防御和特防。 最多积蓄３次。
description_en: The user stores power and boosts its Defense and Sp. Def stats. This move can be used up to three times.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Defense and Special Defense by one stage each.  Stores energy for use with spit up and swallow.  Up to three levels of energy can be stored, and all are lost if the user leaves the field.  Energy is still stored even if the stat boosts cannot be applied.  If the user uses baton pass, the stat boosts are passed as normal, but the stored energy is not.

description_ja: 蓄えた　力を 相手に　ぶつけて　攻撃する。 蓄えているほど　威力が　あがる。
description_zh: 将积蓄的力量 撞向对手进行攻击。 积蓄得越多，威力越大。
description_en: The power stored using the move Stockpile is released at once in an attack. The more power is stored, the greater the move's power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power is equal to 100 times the amount of energy stored by stockpile.  Ignores the random factor in the damage formula.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: 蓄えた　力を　のみこんで 自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。 蓄えているほど　回復する。
description_zh: 将积蓄的力量吞下， 从而回复自己的ＨＰ。 积蓄得越多，回复越大。
description_en: The power stored using the move Stockpile is absorbed by the user to restore its own HP. The more power is stored, the more HP is restored.
effect_en: Heals the user depending on the amount of energy stored by stockpile: 1/4 its max HP after one use, 1/2 its max HP after two uses, or fully after three uses.  Stored energy is consumed, and the user’s Defense and Special Defense are reset to what they would be if stockpile had not been used.  If the user has no energy stored, this move will fail.

description_ja: 熱い　息を 相手に　吹きつけて　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 将炎热的气息 吹向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave them with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

description_ja: ５ターンの　間　あられを　降らして こおりタイプで　ない　ポケモン 全員に　ダメージを　与える。
description_zh: 在５回合内一直降冰雹， 除冰属性的宝可梦以外， 给予全体宝可梦伤害。
description_en: The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns. It damages all Pokémon except Ice types.
effect_en: Changes the weather to hail for five turns, during which non-ice Pokémon are damaged for 1/16 their max HP at the end of every turn.  If the user is holding icy rock, this effect lasts for eight turns.  blizzard has 100% accuracy.  If the target has used detect or protect, blizzard has a (100 - accuracy)% chance to break through the protection.  moonlight, morning sun, and synthesis heal only 1/4 of the user’s max HP.  Pokémon with snow cloak are exempt from this effect’s damage.

description_ja: 相手に　いちゃもんを　つけて 同じ　技を　２回連続で だせなくする。
description_zh: 向对手无理取闹， 令其不能连续２次 使出相同招式。
description_en: The user torments and enrages the target, making it incapable of using the same move twice in a row.
effect_en: Prevents the target from attempting to use the same move twice in a row.  When the target leaves the field, this effect ends.  If the target is forced to attempt a repeated move due to choice band, choice scarf, choice specs, disable, encore, taunt, only having PP remaining for one move, or any other effect, the target will use struggle instead.  The target is then free to use the forced move next turn, as it didn’t use that move this turn.

description_ja: 相手を　おだてて　混乱させる。 同時に　相手の　特攻も あげてしまう。
description_zh: 吹捧对手，使其混乱。 同时还会提高对手的特攻。
description_en: Flattery is used to confuse the target. However, this also boosts the target's Sp. Atk stat.
effect_en: Raises the target’s Special Attack by one stage, then confuses it.

description_ja: 不気味で　怪しい　炎を　放って 相手を　やけどの　状態に　する。
description_zh: 放出怪异的火焰， 从而让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The user shoots a sinister flame at the target to inflict a burn.
effect_en: Burns the target.

description_ja: 自分は　ひんしに　なるが　そのかわりに 相手の　攻撃と　特攻を がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 虽然会使自己陷入濒死， 但是能够大幅降低 对手的攻击和特攻。
description_en: The user faints. In return, the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats are harshly lowered.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by two stages.  User faints.

description_ja: 自分が　毒　まひ　やけど 状態のとき　相手に　くりだすと 技の　威力が　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 当自己处于中毒、麻痹、灼伤状态时， 向对手使出此招式的话， 威力会变成２倍。
description_en: This move's power is doubled if the user is poisoned, burned, or paralyzed.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned, this move has double power.

description_ja: 精神を　高めて　パンチを　くりだす。 技を　だすまでに 攻撃を　受けると　失敗する。
description_zh: 集中精神出拳。 在招式使出前 若受到攻击则会失败。
description_en: The user focuses its mind before launching a punch. This move fails if the user is hit before using the move.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the user takes damage this turn before hitting, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist, metronome, or sleep talk.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target is paralyzed, this move has double power, and the target is cured of its paralysis.

description_ja: 自分に　注目させて 相手からの　攻撃を すべて　自分に　むけさせる。
description_zh: 引起对手的注意， 将对手的攻击 全部转移到自己身上。
description_en: The user draws attention to itself, making all opposing Pokémon take aim only at the user.
effect_en: Until the end of this turn, any moves that opposing Pokémon target solely at the user’s ally will instead target the user.  If both Pokémon on the same side of the field use this move on the same turn, the Pokémon that uses it last will become the target.  This effect takes priority over lightning rod and storm drain.  If the user’s ally switches out, opposing Pokémon may still hit it with pursuit.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 自然の　力で　攻撃する。 使う　場所で でてくる　技が　変化する。
description_zh: 用自然之力进行攻击。 根据所使用场所的不同， 使出的招式也会有所变化。
description_en: This attack makes use of nature’s power. Its effects vary depending on the user’s environment.
effect_en: Uses another move chosen according to the terrain.  Terrain                   | Selected move ------------------------- | ------------------ Building                  | tri attack Cave                      | rock slide Deep water                | hydro pump Desert                    | earthquake Grass                     | seed bomb Mountain                  | rock slide Road                      | earthquake Shallow water             | hydro pump Snow                      | blizzard Tall grass                | seed bomb electric terrain | thunderbolt grassy terrain   | energy ball misty terrain    | moonblast  In Pokémon Battle Revolution:  Terrain        | Selected move -------------- | ------------------ Courtyard      | tri attack Crystal        | rock slide Gateway        | hydro pump Magma          | rock slide Main Street    | tri attack Neon           | tri attack Stargazer      | rock slide Sunny Park     | seed bomb Sunset         | earthquake Waterfall      | seed bomb  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: 次の　ターンに　だす　でんきタイプの 技の　威力を　あげる。 自分の　特防も　あがる。
description_zh: 提高下一回合使出的 电属性的招式威力。 自己的特防也会提高。
description_en: The user becomes charged, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move it uses. This also boosts the user's Sp. Def stat.
effect_en: Raises the user’s Special Defense by one stage.  If the user uses an electric move next turn, its power will be doubled.

description_ja: 相手を　怒らせる。　３ターンの 間　相手は　ダメージを 与える　技しか　だせなくなる。
description_zh: 使对手愤怒。 在３回合内让对手 只能使出给予伤害的招式。
description_en: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.
effect_en: Target is forced to only use damaging moves for the next 3–5 turns, selected at random.  Moves that select other moves not known in advance do not count as damaging.  assist, copycat, me first, metronome, mirror move, and sleep talk do not directly inflict damage and thus may not be used.  bide, counter, endeavor, metal burst, and mirror coat are allowed.

description_ja: 仲間を　助ける。 てだすけ　された　ポケモンの　技の 威力は　いつもより　大きくなる。
description_zh: 帮助伙伴。 被帮助的宝可梦， 其招式威力变得比平时大。
description_en: The user assists an ally by boosting the power of that ally's attack.
effect_en: Boosts the power of the target’s moves by 50% until the end of this turn.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 相手の　すきを　ついて 自分と　相手の 持ち物を　交換する。
description_zh: 抓住对手的空隙， 交换自己和对手的持有物。
description_en: The user catches the target off guard and swaps the target's held item with its own.
effect_en: User and target permanently swap held items.  Works even if one of the Pokémon isn’t holding anything.  If either Pokémon is holding mail, this move will fail.  If either Pokémon has multitype or sticky hold, this move will fail.  If this move results in a Pokémon obtaining choice band, choice scarf, or choice specs, and that Pokémon was the latter of the pair to move this turn, then the move it used this turn becomes its chosen forced move.  This applies even if both Pokémon had a choice item before this move was used.  If the first of the two Pokémon gains a choice item, it may select whatever choice move it wishes next turn.  Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with recycle.  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: 相手に　なりきって　自分も　相手と 同じ　特性に　変化する。
description_zh: 扮演对手， 让自己的特性 变得和对手相同。
description_en: The user mimics the target completely, copying the target's Ability.
effect_en: User’s ability is replaced with the target’s until the user leaves the field.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  If the target has flower gift, forecast, illusion, imposter, multitype, stance change, trace, wonder guard, or zen mode, this move will fail.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: 次の　ターンに　自分　もしくは 入れ替わった　ポケモンの　ＨＰを 最大ＨＰの　半分　回復する。
description_zh: 在下一回合回复自己或是 替换出场的宝可梦最大ＨＰ的一半。
description_en: One turn after this move is used, the user's or its replacement's HP is restored by up to half the user's max HP.
effect_en: At the end of the next turn, user will be healed for half its max HP.  If the user is switched out, its replacement will be healed instead for half of the user’s max HP.  If the user faints or is forcefully switched by roar or whirlwind, this effect will not activate.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Uses a move from another Pokémon in the user’s party, both selected at random.  Moves from fainted Pokémon can be used.  If there are no eligible Pokémon or moves, this move will fail.  This move will not select assist, chatter, circle throw, copycat, counter, covet, destiny bond, detect, dig, dive, dragon tail, endure, feint, fly focus punch, follow me, helping hand, me first, metronome, mimic, mirror coat, mirror move, phantom force protect, quick guard, roar shadow force, sketch, sleep talk, snatch, struggle, switcheroo, thief, trick, whirlwind, or wide guard.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by metronome or sleep talk.

description_ja: 大地に　根を　張り 毎ターン　自分の　ＨＰを　回復する。 根を　張っているので　入れ替えられない。
description_zh: 在大地上扎根， 每回合回复自己的ＨＰ。 因为扎根了，所以不能替换宝可梦。
description_en: The user lays roots that restore its own HP every turn. Because the user is now rooted, it can't switch out.
effect_en: Prevents the user from switching out.  User regains 1/16 of its max HP at the end of every turn.  If the user was immune to ground attacks, it will now take normal damage from them.  roar and whirlwind will not affect the user.  The user cannot use magnet rise.  The user may still use u turn to leave the field.  This effect can be passed with baton pass.

description_ja: すごい　力を　発揮して 相手を　攻撃する。自分の 攻撃と　防御が　さがる。
description_zh: 发挥惊人的力量攻击对手。 自己的攻击和防御会降低。
description_en: The user attacks the target with great power. This also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Attack and Defense by one stage each.

description_ja: 状態異常に　なる　技や やどりぎのタネ　などを だされたとき　相手に　跳ね返す。
description_zh: 当对手使出会变成异常状态的 招式或寄生种子等时， 会将对手的招式反射回去。
description_en: Moves like Leech Seed and moves that inflict status conditions are blocked by a barrier and reflected back to the user of those moves.
effect_en: The first non-damaging move targeting the user this turn that inflicts major status effects, stat changes, or trapping effects will be reflected at its user.  defog, memento, and teeter dance are not reflected.  attract, flatter, gastro acid, leech seed, swagger, worry seed, and yawn are reflected.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move.

description_ja: 戦闘中に　使って　なくなった 自分の　持ち物を　再生させて 使えるように　する。
description_zh: 使战斗中已经消耗掉的 自己的持有物再生， 并可以再次使用。
description_en: The user recycles a held item that has been used in battle so it can be used again.
effect_en: User recovers the last item consumed by the user or a Pokémon in its position on the field.  The item must be used again before it can be recovered by this move again.  If the user is holding an item, this move fails.  Items taken or given away by covet, knock off, switcheroo, thief, or trick may not be recovered.

description_ja: 相手から　技を　受けていると その相手に　対して 与える　ダメージが　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 如果受到对手的招式攻击， 就能给予对手２倍的伤害。
description_en: This attack move’s power is doubled if the user has been hurt by the opponent in the same turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If the target damaged the user this turn and was the last to do so, this move has double power.  pain split does not count as damaging the user.

description_ja: 手刀を　勢いよく　振りおろして 相手を　攻撃する。　ひかりのかべや リフレクター　なども　破壊できる。
description_zh: 将手刀猛烈地挥下攻击对手。 还可以破坏光墙和反射壁等。
description_en: The user attacks with a swift chop. This move can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.
effect_en: Destroys any light screen or reflect on the target’s side of the field, then inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 大きな　あくびで　眠気を　誘う。 次の　ターンに 相手を　眠り状態に　する。
description_zh: 打个大哈欠引起睡意。 在下一回合让对手陷入睡眠状态。
description_en: The user lets loose a huge yawn that lulls the target into falling asleep on the next turn.
effect_en: Puts the target to sleep at the end of the next turn.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  If the target leaves the field, this effect is canceled.  If the target has a status effect when this move is used, this move will fail.  If the target is protected by safeguard when this move is used, this move will fail.  insomnia and vital spirit prevent the sleep if the target has either at the end of the next turn, but will not cause this move to fail on use.

description_ja: 相手の　持ち物を　はたき　落として 戦闘が　終わるまで　使えなくする。 物を持つ　相手には　ダメージが増す。
description_zh: 拍落对手的持有物， 直到战斗结束都不能使用。 对手携带道具时会增加伤害。
description_en: The user slaps down the target's held item, making it unusable for that battle. This move does more damage if the target has a held item.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Target loses its held item.  Neither the user nor the target can recover its item with recycle.  If the target has multitype or sticky hold, it will take damage but not lose its item.

description_ja: 相手の　ＨＰが　自分の　ＨＰと 同じくらいに　なるように ダメージを　与える。
description_zh: 给予伤害， 使对手的ＨＰ变得 和自己的ＨＰ一样。
description_en: The user inflicts damage by cutting down the target's HP to roughly equal the user's HP.
effect_en: Inflicts exactly enough damage to lower the target’s HP to equal the user’s.  If the target’s HP is not higher than the user’s, this move has no effect.  Type immunity applies, but other type effects are ignored.  This effect counts as damage for moves that respond to damage.

description_ja: 怒りを　爆発させて　相手を 攻撃する。　自分の　ＨＰが 少ないほど　技の　威力は　さがる。
description_zh: 爆发怒火攻击对手。 自己的ＨＰ越少， 招式的威力越小。
description_en: The user attacks opposing Pokémon with explosive fury. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Power increases with the user’s remaining HP and is given by `150 * HP / max HP`, to a maximum of 150 when the user has full HP.

description_ja: 超能力で　自分の　特性と 相手の　特性を　入れ替える。
description_zh: 利用超能力互换 自己和对手的特性。
description_en: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.
effect_en: User and target switch abilities.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  If either Pokémon has multitype or wonder guard, this move will fail.

description_ja: 相手が　自分と　同じ　技を おぼえていたら　相手だけ その技を　使えなくする。
description_zh: 如果对手有和自己相同的招式， 那么只有对手无法使用该招式。
description_en: If opposing Pokémon know any move also known by the user, they are prevented from using it.
effect_en: Prevents any Pokémon on the opposing side of the field from using any move the user knows until the user leaves the field.  This effect is live; if the user obtains new moves while on the field, these moves become restricted.  If no opposing Pokémon knows any of the user’s moves when this move is used, this move will fail.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Removes a burn, paralysis, or poison from the user.

description_ja: 相手の　技で　ひんしに　されたとき おんねんを　かけて その技の　ＰＰを　０に　する。
description_zh: 因对手的招式而陷入濒死时 给对手施加怨念， 让该招式的ＰＰ变成０。
description_en: If the user faints, the user’s grudge fully depletes the PP of the opponent’s move that knocked it out.
effect_en: If the user faints before it next acts, the move that fainted it will have its PP dropped to 0.  End-of-turn damage does not trigger this effect.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: The next time a Pokémon uses a beneficial move on itself or itself and its ally this turn, the user of this move will steal the move and use it itself.  Moves which may be stolen by this move are identified by the "snatchable" flag.  If two Pokémon use this move on the same turn, the faster Pokémon will steal the first beneficial move, and the slower Pokémon will then steal it again—thus, only the slowest Pokémon using this move ultimately gains a stolen move’s effect.  If the user steals psych up, it will target the Pokémon that used psych up.  If the user was the original target of psych up, and the Pokémon that originally used it’s affected by pressure, it will only lose 1 PP.  This move cannot be copied by mirror move, nor selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします

effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to inflict an effect chosen according to the terrain.  Terrain        | Effect -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- Building       | Paralyzes target Cave           | Makes target flinch Deep water     | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Desert         | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Grass          | Puts target to sleep Mountain       | Makes target flinch Road           | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Shallow water  | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Snow           | Freezes target Tall grass     | Puts target to sleep  In Pokémon Battle Revolution:  Terrain        | Effect -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- Courtyard      | Paralyzes target Crystal        | Makes target flinch Gateway        | Lowers target’s Attack by one stage Magma          | Makes target flinch Main Street    | Paralyzes target Neon           | Paralyzes target Stargazer      | Makes target flinch Sunny Park     | Puts target to sleep Sunset         | Lowers target’s accuracy by one stage Waterfall      | Puts target to sleep

description_ja: １ターン目で　潜り　２ターン目に 浮きあがって　攻撃する。
description_zh: 第１回合潜入， 第２回合浮上来进行攻击。
description_en: The user dives on the first turn, then floats up and attacks on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User dives underwater for one turn, becoming immune to attack, and hits on the second turn.  During the immune turn, surf, and whirlpool still hit the user normally, and their power is doubled if appropriate.  The user may be hit during its immune turn if under the effect of lock on, mind reader, or no guard.  This move cannot be selected by sleep talk.

description_ja: ひらいた　両手で 相手を　つっぱって　攻撃する。 ２ー５回の　間　連続で　だす。
description_zh: 用张开着的双手 猛推对手进行攻击。 连续攻击２～５次。
description_en: The user attacks the target with open-palmed arm thrusts. This move hits two to five times in a row.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits 2–5 times in one turn.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.

description_ja: まばゆい　光を 解放して　攻撃する。 相手の　特防を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 释放耀眼的光芒进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的特防。
description_en: The user lets loose a damaging burst of light. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 霧状の　羽毛で　包みこみ 攻撃する。 相手の　特攻を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 用围绕着雾状 羽毛的球进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的特攻。
description_en: A mist-like flurry of down envelops and damages the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Atk stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

description_ja: 羽毛を　ふりまいて 相手の　体に　からませる。 相手の　攻撃を　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 撒出羽毛， 笼罩在对手的周围。 大幅降低对手的攻击。
description_en: The user covers the target's body with a mass of down that harshly lowers its Attack stat.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stages.

description_ja: フラフラと　ダンスを　おどって 自分の　周りに　いるものを 混乱状態に　させる。
description_zh: 摇摇晃晃地跳起舞蹈， 让自己周围的宝可梦 陷入混乱状态。
description_en: The user performs a wobbly dance that confuses every Pokémon around it.
effect_en: Confuses all targets.

description_ja: 攻撃した　相手を やけど状態に　することが　ある。 急所にも　当たりやすい。
description_zh: 攻击对手后， 有时会使其陷入灼伤状态。 也容易击中要害。
description_en: The user launches a kick that has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move. Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

effect_en: electric moves inflict half damage, regardless of target.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.

effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User is forced to use this move for five turns.  Power doubles every time this move is used in succession to a maximum of 16x, and resets to normal after the lock-in ends.  If this move misses or becomes unusable, the lock-in ends.  If the user has used defense curl since entering the field, this move has double power.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: 怠けて　やすむ。 自分の　ＨＰを　最大ＨＰの 半分　回復する。
description_zh: 偷懒休息。 回复自己最大ＨＰ的一半。
description_en: The user slacks off, restoring its own HP by up to half its max HP.
effect_en: Heals the user for half its max HP.

description_ja: うるさく　響く　大きな　振動を 相手に　与えて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 给予对手又吵又响的 巨大震动进行攻击。
description_en: The user attacks by letting loose a horribly loud, resounding cry.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 毒の　ある　キバで 相手に　かみついて　攻撃する。 猛毒を　おわせる　ことが　ある。
description_zh: 用有毒的牙齿 咬住对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手中剧毒。
description_en: The user bites the target with toxic fangs. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to badly poison the target.

description_ja: 硬く　鋭い　ツメで 切り裂いて　攻撃する。 相手の　防御を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 用坚硬的锐爪 劈开对手进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user slashes the target with hard and sharp claws. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 50% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 爆発の　炎で 相手を　焼きつくして　攻撃する。 次の　ターンは　動けなくなる。
description_zh: 用爆炸的火焰 烧尽对手进行攻击。 下一回合自己将无法动弹。
description_en: The target is razed by a fiery explosion. The user can't move on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

description_ja: 水の　大砲を 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 次の　ターンは　動けなくなる。
description_zh: 向对手喷射水炮进行攻击。 下一回合自己将无法动弹。
description_en: The target is hit with a watery blast. The user can't move on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

description_ja: すい星の　ごとく　パンチを　くりだして 相手を　攻撃する。　自分の 攻撃が　あがることが　ある。
description_zh: 使出彗星般的拳头攻击对手。 有时会提高自己的攻击。
description_en: The target is hit with a hard punch fired like a meteor. This may also boost the user’s Attack stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage. Has a 20% chance to raise the user’s Attack one stage.

description_ja: 大きな　声などで 不意に　驚かして　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 用尖叫声等 突然惊吓对手进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user attacks the target by crying out in a startling fashion. This may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: 使ったときの　天気に　よって 技の　タイプと　威力が　変わる。
description_zh: 根据使用时的天气， 招式属性和威力会改变。
description_en: This move's type and power change depending on the weather at the time the move is used.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  If a weather move is active, this move has double power, and its type becomes the type of the weather move.  shadow sky is typeless for the purposes of this move.

description_ja: 心地好い　やすらぐ　香りを　かがせて 味方全員の　状態異常を　回復する。
description_zh: 让同伴闻沁人心脾的香气， 从而治愈我方全员的异常状态。
description_en: This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
effect_en: Removes major status effects and confusion from every Pokémon in the user’s party.

description_ja: ないた　ふりをして　涙を　流す。 こまらせる　ことで 相手の　特防を　がくっと　さげる。
description_zh: 装哭流泪。 使对手不知所措， 从而大幅降低对手的特防。
description_en: The user feigns crying to fluster the target. This harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.
effect_en: Lowers the target’s Special Defense by two stages.

description_ja: 鋭い　風で 相手を　切りつけて　攻撃する。 急所に　当たりやすい。
description_zh: 用锐利的风 切斩对手进行攻击。 容易击中要害。
description_en: The user launches razor-like wind to slash opposing Pokémon. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User’s critical hit rate is one level higher when using this move.

description_ja: フルパワーで　相手を　攻撃する。 使うと　反動で 自分の　特攻が　がくっと　さがる。
description_zh: 使出全部力量攻击对手。 使用之后会因为反作用力， 自己的特攻大幅降低。
description_en: The user attacks the target with all its might. The recoil from this move harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage, then lowers the user’s Special Attack by two stages.

effect_en: Resets the target’s evasion to normal and prevents any further boosting until the target leaves the field.  A ghost under this effect takes normal damage from normal and fighting moves.  This move itself ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

description_ja: 岩石を　投げつけて　攻撃する。 相手の　動きを　封じることで 素早さを　さげる。
description_zh: 投掷岩石进行攻击。 封住对手的行动， 从而降低速度。
description_en: The user hurls boulders at the target to inflict damage. This also lowers the target's Speed stat by cutting off its movement.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

description_ja: この技は　使えません 思い出すことが　できなくなりますが 技を　忘れることを　おすすめします
description_zh: 无法使用这个招式。 虽然忘记之后就再也想不起来了， 但还是建议忘记这个招式。
description_en: This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  This move can hit Pokémon under the effect of bounce, fly, or sky drop.

description_ja: 激しく　吹きあれる　砂あらしの 中に　４ー５ターンの　間 相手を　閉じこめて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 将对手困在 铺天盖地的沙暴中， 在４～５回合内进行攻击。
description_en: The user traps the target inside a harshly raging sandstorm that inflicts damage for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.

description_ja: 相手を　一撃で　瀕死に　する。 こおりタイプ　以外の　ポケモンが 使うと　当たりにくい。
description_zh: 给对手一击濒死。 如果是冰属性以外的宝可梦使用， 就会难以打中。
description_en: The target faints instantly. This move is less likely to hit the target if used by Pokémon other than Ice types.
effect_en: Inflicts damage equal to the target’s max HP.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.  This move’s accuracy is 30% plus 1% for each level the user is higher than the target.  If the user is a lower level than the target, this move will fail.  Because this move inflicts a specific and finite amount of damage, endure still prevents the target from fainting.  The effects of lock on, mind reader, and no guard still apply, as long as the user is equal or higher level than the target.  However, they will not give this move a chance to break through detect or protect.

description_ja: 濁った　水を 相手に　発射して　攻撃する。 命中率を　さげることが　ある。
description_zh: 向对手喷射 浑浊的水进行攻击。 有时会降低对手的命中率。
