effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 胸の　ナットを　軸に　回転して ２回　続けて　うでを　たたきつける。 相手を　ひるませる　ことが　ある。
description_zh: 以胸口的螺帽为中心旋转， 并连续２次挥动手臂打击对手。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user rotates, centering the hex nut in its chest, and then strikes with its arms twice in a row. This may also make the target flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn.

description_ja: 相手の　攻撃を まったく　受けない。 連続で　だすと　失敗しやすい。
description_zh: 完全抵挡 对手的攻击。 连续使出则容易失败。
description_en: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.
effect_en: No moves will hit the user for the remainder of this turn.  If the user is last to act this turn, this move will fail.  If the user successfully used detect, endure, protect, quick guard, or wide guard on the last turn, this move has a 50% chance to fail.  lock on, mind reader, and no guard provide a (100 – accuracy)% chance for moves to break through this move.  This does not apply to one-hit KO moves (fissure, guillotine, horn drill, and sheer cold); those are always blocked by this move.  thunder during rain dance and blizzard during hail have a 30% chance to break through this move.  The following effects are not prevented by this move:  * acupressure from an ally * curse’s curse effect * Delayed damage from doom desire and future sight; however, these moves will be prevented if they are used this turn * feint, which will also end this move’s protection after it hits * imprison * perish song * shadow force * Moves that merely copy the user, such as transform or psych up  This move cannot be selected by assist or metronome.

description_ja: コアから　ビームを　放って　攻撃。 相手が　ダイマックス　していると ダメージは　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 从核心放出光束进行攻击。 如果对手正处于极巨化状态， 则造成的伤害会变为２倍。
description_en: The user condenses energy within its body and unleashes that energy from its core to inflict damage.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) sets light screen on the user’s side of the field.

description_ja: 相手の　技を　引き受ける 特性や　技の　影響を　無視して 選んだ　相手を　攻撃　できる。
description_zh: 能无视具有吸引对手招式效果的 特性或招式的影响。 可以向选定的对手进行攻击。
description_en: The user ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon's moves and Abilities that draw in moves, allowing this move to hit the chosen target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) sets reflect on the user’s side of the field.

description_ja: お互い　ひんしに　なるまで 交代が　できなくなる。　どちらかの ポケモンが　いなくなると　効果は消える。
description_zh: 使双方直到一方濒死为止 无法替换宝可梦。 其中一方退场则可以解除效果。
description_en: This move prevents the user and the target from switching out until either of them faints. The effect goes away if either of the Pokémon leaves the field.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) sets leech seed on the target.

description_ja: 持っている　きのみを　食べて 防御を　ぐーんと　あげる。
description_zh: 吃掉携带的树果， 大幅提高防御。
description_en: The user eats its held Berry, then sharply boosts its Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage, then (if successful) removes major status effects from every Pokémon in the user’s party.

description_ja: 自分の　すべての 能力が　上がるが　交代　したり 逃げることが　できなくなる。
description_zh: 提高自己的所有能力， 但无法替换或逃走。
description_en: This move boosts all the user's stats but prevents the user from switching out or fleeing.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Hits twice in one turn, with a 100% chance to make the target flinch.

description_ja: ねばねばの　タールを　浴びせて 相手の　素早さを　下げる。 相手は　ほのおが　弱点に　なる。
description_zh: 泼洒黏糊糊的沥青， 降低对手的速度， 并且使对手的弱点变为火。
description_en: The user pours sticky tar over the target, lowering the target's Speed stat. The target becomes weaker to Fire-type moves.

description_ja: まほうのこなを　浴びせて 相手を　エスパータイプに　変化させる。
description_zh: 向对手喷洒魔法粉， 使对手变为超能力属性。
description_en: The user scatters a cloud of magic powder that changes the target's type to Psychic.

description_ja: ドラメシヤで　２回　攻撃。 相手が　２匹　いるときは それぞれに　１回ずつ　攻撃する。
description_zh: 让多龙梅西亚进行２次攻击。 如果对手有２只宝可梦， 则对它们各进行１次攻击。
description_en: The user attacks twice using Dreepy. If there are two opposing Pokémon, this move hits each of them once.

description_ja: おちゃかいを　ひらいて 場にいる　ポケモンが　それぞれ 持っている　きのみを　食べる。
description_zh: 举办一场茶会， 场上的所有宝可梦都会 吃掉自己携带的树果。
description_en: The user has teatime with all the Pokémon currently in the battle. Each Pokémon eats its held Berry.

description_ja: 相手を　逃げられなくする。 かためられた　相手は　毎ターン 防御と　特防が　下がる。
description_zh: 让对手无法逃走。 对手被固定后， 每回合都会降低防御和特防。
description_en: The user locks the target in and prevents it from fleeing. This move also lowers the target’s Defense and Sp. Def every turn.

description_ja: 電気を　まとった　くちばしで　刺す。 相手より　先に　攻撃できると 技の　威力は　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 用带电的喙啄刺对手。 如果比对手先出手攻击， 招式的威力会变成２倍。
description_en: The user stabs the target with its electrified beak. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

description_ja: かたい　エラで　かみつく。 相手より　先に　攻撃できると 技の　威力は　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 用坚硬的腮咬住对手。 如果比对手先出手攻击， 招式的威力会变成２倍。
description_en: The user rends the target with its hard gills. If the user attacks before the target, the power of this move is doubled.

description_ja: 不思議な　力で お互いの　場の　効果を　入れ替える。
description_zh: 用神奇的力量 交换双方的场地效果。
description_en: With its mysterious power, the user swaps the effects on either side of the field.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　ほのおタイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　日差しを　強くする。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的火属性攻击。 可在５回合内让日照变得强烈。
description_en: This is a Fire-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user intensifies the sun for five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　むしタイプの　攻撃。 相手の　特攻を　下げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的虫属性攻击。 会降低对手的特攻。
description_en: This is a Bug-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Atk stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　でんきタイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　エレキフィールドにする。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的电属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成电气场地。
description_en: This is an Electric-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Electric Terrain for five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　ノーマルタイプの　攻撃。 相手の　素早さを　下げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的一般属性攻击。 会降低对手的速度。
description_en: This is a Normal-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Speed stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　かくとうタイプの　攻撃。 味方の　攻撃を　上げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的格斗属性攻击。 会提高我方的攻击。
description_en: This is a Fighting-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Attack stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　ゴーストタイプの　攻撃。 相手の　防御を　下げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的幽灵属性攻击。 会降低对手的防御。
description_en: This is a Ghost-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　こおりタイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　あられを　降らす。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦 才能使出的冰属性攻击。 在５回合内会降下冰雹。
description_en: This is an Ice-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a hailstorm lasting five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　どくタイプの　攻撃。 味方の　特攻を　上げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的毒属性攻击。 会提高我方的特攻。
description_en: This is a Poison-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　みずタイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　雨を　降らせる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的水属性攻击。 可在５回合内降下大雨。
description_en: This is a Water-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a heavy rain that falls for five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　ひこうタイプの　攻撃。 味方の　素早さを　上げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的飞行属性攻击。 会提高我方的速度。
description_en: This is a Flying-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Speed stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　フェアリータイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　ミストフィールドにする。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的妖精属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成薄雾场地。
description_en: This is a Fairy-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Misty Terrain for five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　ドラゴンタイプの　攻撃。 相手の　攻撃を　下げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的龙属性攻击。 会降低对手的攻击。
description_en: This is a Dragon-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Attack stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　エスパータイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　サイコフィールドにする。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的超能力属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成精神场地。
description_en: This is a Psychic-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Psychic Terrain for five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　いわタイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　砂あらしにする。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的岩石属性攻击。 可在５回合内卷起沙暴。
description_en: This is a Rock-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user summons a sandstorm lasting five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　じめんタイプの　攻撃。 味方の　特防を　上げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的地面属性攻击。 会提高我方的特防。
description_en: This is a Ground-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Sp. Def stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　あくタイプの　攻撃。 相手の　特防を　下げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的恶属性攻击。 会降低对手的特防。
description_en: This is a Dark-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This lowers the target’s Sp. Def stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　くさタイプの　攻撃。 ５ターンの　間　グラスフィールドにする。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的草属性攻击。 可在５回合内将脚下变成青草场地。
description_en: This is a Grass-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. The user turns the ground into Grassy Terrain for five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ダイマックスした　ポケモンが 繰りだす　はがねタイプの　攻撃。 味方の　防御を　上げる。
description_zh: 极巨化宝可梦使出的钢属性攻击。 会提高我方的防御。
description_en: This is a Steel-type attack Dynamax Pokémon use. This raises ally Pokémon’s Defense stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 自分の　ＨＰを　少し　削って すべての　能力を　上げる。
description_zh: 削减少许自己的ＨＰ， 使所有能力都提高。
description_en: The user boosts all its stats by using some of its own HP.

description_ja: 体を　ぶつけて　攻撃。 防御が　高いほど 与える　ダメージが　増える。
description_zh: 用身体撞向对手进行攻击。 防御越高， 给予的伤害就越高。
description_en: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense stat, the greater the damage this move deals.

description_ja: かざりつけを　することで 相手の　攻撃と　特攻を ぐーんと　上げる。
description_zh: 通过装饰， 大幅提高对方的 攻击和特攻。
description_en: The user sharply boosts the target's Attack and Sp. Atk stats by decorating the target.

description_ja: ドラムの　根っこを　ドラミングで コントロールして　こうげき　することで 相手の　素早さを　下げる。
description_zh: 用鼓点来控制 鼓的根部进行攻击， 从而降低对手的速度。
description_en: The user plays its drum, controlling the drum's roots to attack the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

description_ja: トラバサミで　捕らえて ４－５ターンの　間 相手を　はさんで　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使用捕兽夹， 在４～５回合内， 夹住对手进行攻击。
description_en: The user snares the target in a snap trap for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  For the next 2–5 turns, the target cannot leave the field and is damaged for 1/16 its max HP at the end of each turn.  The user continues to use other moves during this time.  If the user leaves the field, this effect ends.  Has a 3/8 chance each to hit 2 or 3 times, and a 1/8 chance each to hit 4 or 5 times.  Averages to 3 hits per use.  rapid spin cancels this effect.

description_ja: 小石を　燃やした　炎の　ボールで 相手を　攻撃する。 やけど　状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 点燃小石子，形成火球攻击对手。 有时会使对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The user attacks by igniting a small stone and launching it as a fiery ball at the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 10% chance to burn the target.

description_ja: 巨大な　剣となり　切りかかる。 相手が　ダイマックス　していると ダメージは　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 变身为巨大的剑，挥斩对手。 如果对手正处于极巨化状态， 则造成的伤害会变为２倍。
description_en: The user becomes a gigantic sword and cuts the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

description_ja: 巨大な　盾となり　ぶつかる。 相手が　ダイマックス　していると ダメージは　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 变身为巨大的盾，撞击对手。 如果对手正处于极巨化状态， 则造成的伤害会变为２倍。
description_en: The user becomes a gigantic shield and slams into the target. This move deals twice the damage if the target is Dynamaxed.

description_ja: ほほぶくろに　溜めた　エネルギーで 攻撃し　自分の　素早さを　あげる。 モルペコの　姿で　タイプが　変わる。
description_zh: 用储存在颊囊里的能量 进行攻击，并提高自己的速度。 其属性会随着莫鲁贝可的样子而改变。
description_en: Morpeko attacks and boosts its Speed stat with the energy stored in its cheeks. This move's type changes depending on the user's form.

description_ja: きょうじんな　しっぽを　激しく ふりはらって　相手を　攻撃する。 相手の　攻撃を　下げる。
description_zh: 用坚韧的尾巴 猛扫对手进行攻击， 从而降低对手的攻击。
description_en: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

description_ja: するどく　とがった　枝で 相手を　突いて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 使用尖锐的树枝 刺向对手进行攻击。
description_en: The user attacks the target by poking it with a sharply pointed branch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ギターや　ベースを　かきならして 激しく　響く　大きな　振動を 相手に　与えて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 奏响吉他和贝斯，释放出 发出巨响的剧烈震动 攻击对手。
description_en: The user attacks opposing Pokémon by twanging a guitar or bass guitar, causing a huge echo and strong vibration.

description_ja: すっぱい　りんごから　つくりだした 酸性の　液体で　攻撃。 相手の　特防を　下げる。
description_zh: 使用从酸苹果中提取出来的 酸性液体进行攻击。 降低对手的特防。
description_en: The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.

description_ja: 高いところから　りんごを　落として ダメージを　与える。 相手の　防御を　下げる。
description_zh: 从高处落下苹果， 给予对手伤害。 可降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user inflicts damage by dropping an apple from high above. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Lowers the target’s Defense by one stage.

description_ja: 食らうと　くじけるほどの 勢いで　攻撃。 相手の　特攻を　下げる。
description_zh: 用足以让对手一蹶不振的 气势进行攻击。 会降低对手的特攻。
description_en: The user attacks the target with so much force that it could break the target's spirit. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

description_ja: 煙を　噴出して 相手を　攻撃。 混乱　させることが　ある。
description_zh: 喷出烟雾攻击对手。 有时会使对手混乱。
description_en: The user attacks the target by emitting steam. This may also confuse the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

description_ja: 不思議な　水を　ふりまいて 自分と　場にいる 味方の　ＨＰを　回復する。
description_zh: 喷洒出神奇的水， 回复自己和场上同伴的ＨＰ。
description_en: The user scatters mysterious water around and restores the HP of itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.

description_ja: 相手の　攻撃を　まったく　受けない。 連続で　だすと　失敗しやすい。 触れると　防御が　がくっと　下がる。
description_zh: 完全抵挡对手的攻击。 连续使出则容易失败。 一旦触碰，防御就会大幅降低。
description_en: This move enables the user to protect itself from all attacks. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession. Direct contact harshly lowers the attacker’s Defense stat.

description_ja: 頭を　下げる　ふりを　しながら 振りみだした　髪の毛を　突き刺す。 攻撃は　必ず　命中する。
description_zh: 装作低头认错的样子， 用凌乱的头发进行突刺。 攻击必定会命中。
description_en: The user pretends to bow its head, but then it stabs the target with its disheveled hair. This attack never misses.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Ignores accuracy and evasion modifiers.

description_ja: 太い　クキを　ふりまわして　攻撃。 ただし　自分も　よろめいてしまうため 次の　ターンは　動けなくなる。
description_zh: 大力挥舞粗壮的茎进行攻击。 但同时自己也会被晃晕， 下一回合自己将无法动弹。
description_en: The user attacks wildly with its thick leek. The user can’t move on the next turn, because the force of this move makes it stagger.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

description_ja: 本来の　姿と　なった ムゲンダイナ　最大の　攻撃。 次の　ターンは　動けなくなる。
description_zh: 无极汰那变回原来的样子后， 发动的最强攻击。 下一回合自己将无法动弹。
description_en: This is Eternatus’s most powerful attack in its original form. The user can’t move on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  User loses its next turn to "recharge", and cannot attack or switch out during that turn.

description_ja: 全身から　集めた　はがねを ビームとして　激しく　撃ちだす。 自分も　ダメージを　受けてしまう。
description_zh: 将从全身聚集的钢铁 化为光束，激烈地发射出去。 自己也会受到伤害。
description_en: The user fires a beam of steel that it collected from its entire body. This also damages the user.
effect_en: Inflicts damage, and the user takes damage equal to half of its max HP, rounded up. The user still takes damage if the move is blocked by Protect or Substitute, misses, or if the target has Flash Fire.

description_ja: サイコパワーで　相手を　攻撃する。 サイコフィールドの時　威力が　あがり すべての　相手に　ダメージを　与える。
description_zh: 利用精神力量攻击对手。 在精神场地上威力会有所提高， 能对所有对手造成伤害。
description_en: The user attacks the target with its psychic power. When the ground is Psychic Terrain, this move's power is boosted and it damages all opposing Pokémon.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: フィールドを　破壊しながら　攻撃。 なんらかの　フィールド状態に 変わっていないと　技は　失敗する。
description_zh: 在破坏场地的同时攻击对手。 如果脚下没有任何场地状态存在， 使出此招式时便会失败。
description_en: The user attacks while destroying the terrain. This move fails if the ground hasn't turned into a terrain.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ウロコを　撃ちだして　攻撃する。 ２ー５回の　間　連続で　だす。 素早さが　あがるが　防御が　さがる。
description_zh: 发射鳞片进行攻击。 连续攻击２～５次。 速度会提高但防御会降低。
description_en: The user attacks by shooting scales two to five times in a row. This move boosts the user's Speed stat but lowers its Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage two to five times in a row, raising the user’s Speed and lowering the user’s Defense by one stage each upon last hit.

description_ja: １ターン目に　宇宙の　力を 集めることで　特攻が　あがり ２ターン目に　相手を　攻撃する。
description_zh: 第１回合聚集宇宙之力提高特攻， 第２回合攻击对手。
description_en: The user gathers energy from space and boosts its Sp. Atk stat on the first turn, then attacks on the next turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 物理か　特殊か　より多く　ダメージを 与えられる　能力で　攻撃する。 毒状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 从物理攻击和特殊攻击中选择 可造成较多伤害的方式进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入中毒状态。
description_en: This move is either physical or special—whichever will inflict more damage. This may also poison the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 自分の　周りに　いる　すべてを 攻撃するが　使うと　瀕死になる。 ミストフィールドで　威力が　あがる。
description_zh: 对自己周围的所有宝可梦进行攻击， 但使出后，自己会陷入濒死。 在薄雾场地上，招式威力会提高。
description_en: The user attacks everything around it and faints upon using this move. This move's power is boosted on Misty Terrain.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 地面を　滑るように　相手を　攻撃。 グラスフィールドの時 必ず　先制攻撃　できる。
description_zh: 仿佛在地面上滑行般地攻击对手。 在青草场地上， 必定能够先制攻击。
description_en: Gliding on the ground, the user attacks the target. This move always goes first on Grassy Terrain.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 地面から　立ちのぼる　電撃で　攻撃。 相手が　エレキフィールドに　いる時 技の　威力が　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 用从地面升腾而起的电击进行攻击。 当对手处于电气场地上时， 招式威力会变成２倍。
description_en: The user attacks with electricity rising from the ground. This move's power is doubled if the target is on Electric Terrain.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: フィールドの力を　借りて　攻撃。 使った時の　フィールドの状態に　よって 技の　タイプと　威力が　変わる。
description_zh: 借助场地的力量进行攻击。 视使出招式时场地状态不同， 招式的属性和威力会有所变化。
description_en: The user utilizes the energy of the terrain to attack. This move’s type and power change depending on the terrain at the time the move is used.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 背後から　はいより　攻撃する。 相手の　特攻を　さげる。
description_zh: 从对手背后爬近后进行攻击。 会降低对手的特攻。
description_en: The user skitters behind the target to attack. This also lowers the target's Sp. Atk stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: しっとの　エネルギーで　相手を　攻撃。 そのターン　能力が　あがった　ポケモンを やけどの　状態に　する。
description_zh: 用嫉妒的能量攻击对手。 会让在该回合内能力有所提高的 宝可梦陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The user attacks with energy from jealousy. This leaves all opposing Pokémon that have had their stats boosted during the turn with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 相手への　いらだちを　ぶつけて　攻撃。 そのターンに　能力を　さげられていると 技の　威力が　２倍に　なる。
description_zh: 攻击对手以发泄对其感到的恼怒情绪。 如果在该回合内自身能力遭到降低， 招式的威力会变成２倍。
description_en: The user lashes out to vent its frustration toward the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's stats were lowered during this turn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 相手の　持ち物を　あやつって　攻撃。 相手が　道具を　持っていない　場合は 失敗する。
description_zh: 操纵对手的持有物进行攻击。 当对手没有携带道具时， 使出此招式时便会失败。
description_en: The user attacks by controlling the target's item. This move fails if the target isn't holding an item.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 強い　酸性の　ガスで 周りに　いるものを　包みこみ 持っている　道具を　溶かしてしまう。
description_zh: 用具有强酸性的气体 包裹住自己周围所有的宝可梦， 并融化其所携带的道具。
description_en: The user surrounds everything around it with highly acidic gas and melts away items they hold.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 的確な　指導を　おこなうことで　 味方　全員の 攻撃と　防御を　上げる。
description_zh: 通过进行正确合理的指导， 提高我方全员的攻击和防御。
description_en: The user properly coaches its ally Pokémon, boosting their Attack and Defense stats.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 攻撃した　あと ものすごい　スピードで　戻ってきて 控えの　ポケモンと　入れ替わる。
description_zh: 在攻击之后急速返回， 和后备宝可梦进行替换。
description_en: After making its attack, the user rushes back to switch places with a party Pokémon in waiting.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ３回連続で　キックを　くりだして 攻撃する。　技が　当たるたびに 威力は　あがる。
description_zh: 连续３次踢对手进行攻击。 每踢中一次，威力就会提高。
description_en: A consecutive three-kick attack that becomes more powerful with each successful hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 翼を　相手に　ぶつけて 攻撃する。　２回連続で ダメージを　与える。
description_zh: 将翅膀撞向对手进行攻击。 连续２次给予伤害。
description_en: The user slams the target with its wings to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 熱く　焼けた　砂を 相手に　ぶつけて　攻撃する。 やけど状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 将滚烫的沙子砸向对手进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入灼伤状态。
description_en: The user throws scorching sand at the target to attack. This may also leave the target with a burn.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.  Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

description_ja: ジャングルと　一体化して 自分と　場にいる　味方の ＨＰと　状態を　回復する。
description_zh: 与丛林融为一体， 回复自己和场上同伴的ＨＰ和状态。
description_en: The user becomes one with the jungle, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: あくの型を　極めし 強烈な　一撃。 必ず　急所に　当たる。
description_zh: 将恶之流派修炼至大成的 猛烈一击。 必定会击中要害。
description_en: The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: みずの型を　極めし 流れるような　３回の　連撃。 必ず　急所に　当たる。
description_zh: 将水之流派修炼至大成的 仿若行云流水般的３次连击。 必定会击中要害。
description_en: The user, having mastered the Water style, strikes the target with a flowing motion three times in a row. This move always lands a critical hit.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: ほとばしる　電気の　おりの　中に ４ー５ターンの　間 相手を　閉じこめて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 将对手困在 电流四溅的囚笼中， 在４～５回合内进行攻击。
description_en: The user traps the target inside a cage of sparking electricity that inflicts damage for four to five turns.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 生命力を　パワーに　変え　相手を 攻撃する。　自分の　ＨＰが　少ないほど 技の　威力は　さがる。
description_zh: 把生命力转换为力量攻击对手。 自己的ＨＰ越少，招式的威力越小。
description_en: Converting its life-force into power, the user attacks opposing Pokémon. The lower the user's HP, the lower the move's power.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 両目から　サイコパワーを 撃ちだして　攻撃する。 こおり状態に　することが　ある。
description_zh: 从双眼发射精神力量进行攻击。 有时会让对手陷入冰冻状态。
description_en: The user shoots its psychic power from its eyes to attack. This may also leave the target frozen.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 怒りを　炎の　ような オーラに　変えて　攻撃する。 相手を　ひるませることが　ある。
description_zh: 将愤怒转化为火焰般的气场进行攻击。 有时会使对手畏缩。
description_en: The user transforms its wrath into a fire-like aura to attack. This may also make opposing Pokémon flinch.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 雷の　ような　動きで 相手を　翻弄しながら　キックする。 相手の　防御を　さげる。
description_zh: 以雷电般的动作 戏耍对手的同时使出脚踢。 可降低对手的防御。
description_en: The user overwhelms the target with lightning-like movement before delivering a kick. This also lowers the target's Defense stat.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 吹雪を　まとった　氷の　槍を 相手に　投げつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 向对手投掷 掀起暴风雪的冰矛进行攻击。
description_en: The user attacks by hurling a blizzard-cloaked icicle lance at opposing Pokémon.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: たくさんの　小さな　霊体を 相手に　ぶつけて　攻撃する。
description_zh: 用大量的小灵体向 对手发起攻击。
description_en: The user attacks by sending a frightful amount of small ghosts at opposing Pokémon.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_ja: 強力な　サイコパワーで　攻撃。 相手が　最後に　使った技の ＰＰを　３だけ　減らす。
description_zh: 用强大的精神力量攻击。 让对手最后使用的招式 减少３ＰＰ。
description_en: The user attacks with its tremendous psychic power. This also drains 3 PP from the move last used by the target.
effect_en: Inflicts regular damage.

description_en: The user lashes out at the target with ruinous claws. This may also leave the target poisoned, paralyzed, or asleep.
Cloaking itself in psychic energy, the user slams into the target. This also boosts the user’s Defense stat.
The user swaps its Attack and Defense stats.
The user swings its stone axes at the target. Stone splinters left behind by this attack float around the target.
The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds brimming with love and hate. This may also lower their Attack stats.
The user attacks by emitting a mysterious power. This also boosts the user’s Sp. Atk stat.
The user rampages around spewing flames for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.
The user shrouds itself in water and slams into the target with its whole body to inflict damage. This also damages the user quite a lot.
The user launches its amassed chlorophyll to inflict damage on the target. This also damages the user.
The user hurls giant chunks of ice at the target to inflict damage. This may also make the target flinch.
The user performs an intense dance to usher in victory, boosting its Attack, Defense, and Speed stats.
The user smashes into the target in a full-body tackle. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.
The user launches countless toxic barbs to inflict damage. This may also poison the target. This move’s power is doubled if the target is already poisoned.
The user slashes the target with aura-enriched wings. This also boosts the user's Speed stat. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
The user attacks the target with spine-chilling resentment. This also lowers the target’s Attack stat.
The user makes its skin as hard as an iron shield, sharply boosting its Defense stat.
The user kicks, then fires three arrows. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit and may also lower the target’s Defense stat or make it flinch.
The user attacks with myriad fireballs. This may also leave the target with a burn. This move's power is doubled if the target has a status condition.
The user slashes its shell blade at the target. Shell splinters left behind by this attack remain scattered under the target as spikes.
The user attacks with savagely cold winds that cause both body and spirit to tremble. This may also lower the Speed stats of opposing Pokémon.
The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave opposing Pokémon with paralysis.
The user attacks by wrapping opposing Pokémon in fierce winds and searingly hot sand. This may also leave them with a burn.
The user receives a blessing from the crescent moon, restoring HP and curing status conditions for itself and its ally Pokémon currently in the battle.
The user lifts its spirits, curing its own status conditions and boosting its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.
If the user has Terastallized, it unleashes energy of its Tera Type. This move inflicts damage using the Attack or Sp. Atk stat—whichever is higher for the user.
The user spins a silken trap, protecting itself from damage while lowering the Speed stat of any attacker that makes direct contact.
The user attacks by kicking up into the air and slamming its heel down upon the target. This may also confuse the target. If it misses, the user takes damage instead.
The user attacks to avenge its allies. The more defeated allies there are in the user's party, the greater the move's power.
The user attacks by unleashing a peculiar light that even affects the mind. This also harshly lowers the target's Sp. Def stat.
The user attacks with elegant poise. If the user has a Tatsugiri in its mouth, this move boosts one of the user's stats based on the Tatsugiri's form.
The user summons a torrent around its fist and punches at blinding speed. This move always goes first.
The user emits an incredibly spicy extract, sharply boosting the target's Attack stat and harshly lowering the target's Defense stat.
The user spins furiously by straining its legs, inflicting damage on the target. This also harshly lowers the user's Speed stat.
The user’s fellows gather in droves to perform a combo attack that hits the target one to ten times in a row.
The user covers its feet in thin ice and twirls around, slamming into the target. This move's spinning motion also destroys the terrain.
The user throws its entire body into a reckless charge. After this move is used, attacks on the user cannot miss and will inflict double damage until the user’s next turn.
The user bestows a loving blessing, reviving a party Pokémon that has fainted and restoring half that Pokémon's max HP.
The user salt cures the target, inflicting damage every turn. Steel and Water types are more strongly affected by this move.
The user performs a perfectly timed triple dive, hitting the target with splashes of water three times in a row.
The user performs a spin attack that can also eliminate the effects of such moves as Bind, Wrap, and Leech Seed. This also poisons opposing Pokémon.
The user captures the very essence of the target in a sketch. This changes the Abilities of the user and its ally Pokémon to that of the target.
The user sharply boosts its Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats by using its own HP.
The user slashes at the target after kowtowing to make the target let down its guard. This attack never misses.
The user throws a rigged bouquet of flowers at the target. This attack never misses and always lands a critical hit.
The user blows out raging flames as if singing a song, scorching the target. This also boosts the user's Sp. Atk stat.
The user toys with the target and attacks it using light and fluid dance steps. This also boosts the user's Speed stat.
The user performs a tackle like a raging bull. This move's type depends on the user's form. It can also break barriers, such as Light Screen and Reflect.
The user attacks by throwing out a mass of coins. This also lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat. Money is earned after the battle.
The user rends the target with an ethereal blade. This move's power is boosted by 50 percent if the user is on Electric Terrain.
The user blasts the target with boiling-hot water. This move's power is not lowered in harsh sunlight but rather boosted by 50 percent.
The user summons a ruinous disaster. This cuts the target’s HP in half.
The user transforms and crashes to the ground, causing a massive prehistoric explosion. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it’s a supereffective hit.
The user races forward at ultrafast speeds, piercing its target with futuristic electricity. This move's power is boosted more than usual if it's a supereffective hit.
The user creates a substitute for itself using its own HP before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting.
The user tells a chillingly bad joke before switching places with a party Pokémon in waiting. This summons a snowstorm lasting five turns.
The user tidies up and removes the effects of Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, Toxic Spikes, and Substitute. This also boosts the user’s Attack and Speed stats.
The user summons a snowstorm lasting five turns. This boosts the Defense stats of Ice types.
The user attacks by pouncing on the target. This also lowers the target's Speed stat.
The user attacks suddenly as if leaping out from tall grass. The user's nimble footwork boosts its Speed stat.
The user attacks the target by showering it with water that's so cold it saps the target's power. This also lowers the target's Attack stat.
The user spins the pointed part of its body at high speed to pierce the target. This attack can hit a target using a move such as Protect or Detect.
The user shoots mystical beams from its eyes to inflict damage. The target is hit twice in a row.
The user converts its rage into energy to attack. The more times the user has been hit by attacks, the greater the move's power.
The user shoots its own armor out as blazing projectiles. This also lowers the user’s Defense and Sp. Def stats.
The user focuses its bitter feelings toward the world of the living into a slashing attack. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target.
The user discharges all the electricity from its body to perform a high-damage attack. After using this move, the user will no longer be Electric type.
The user swings its whole body around to attack with its huge hammer. This move can't be used twice in a row.
The user retaliates with much greater force against the opponent that last inflicted damage on it.
The user expels pressurized water to cut at the target like a blade. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
The user unleashes the full brunt of its spirit from a full moon that shines as red as blood. This move can't be used twice in a row.
The user fires a blast of tea that it mixed. The user's HP is restored by up to half the damage taken by the target. This may also leave the target with a burn.
The user sets off an explosion of sticky candy syrup, which coats the target and causes the target's Speed stat to drop each turn for three turns.
The user strikes with an ivy-wrapped cudgel. This move's type changes depending on the mask worn by the user, and it has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
The user gathers electricity on the first turn, boosting its Sp. Atk stat, then fires a high-voltage shot on the next turn. The shot will be fired immediately in rain.
With the power of its crystals, the user bombards and eliminates the target. When used by Terapagos in its Stellar Form, this move damages all opposing Pokémon.
The user shoots a beam of light to inflict damage. Sometimes all the user's heads shoot beams in unison, doubling the move's power.
The user's intensely hot fur protects it from attacks and also burns any attacker that makes direct contact with it.
This move enables the user to attack first with a jolt of electricity. This move fails if the target is not readying an attack.
The user wields the light that has accumulated atop its head to cleave the target. This move hits even if the target protects itself.
The user attacks by launching particle blades at the target twice in a row. This attack never misses.
The target is crushed with an arm, a claw, or the like to inflict damage. The more HP the target has left, the greater the move's power.
The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.
The user attacks the target using its angelic voice. This also confuses the target if its stats have been boosted during the turn.
Spurred by desperation, the user attacks the target. This move's power is doubled if the user's previous move failed.
The user electrifies its body and drops onto the target to inflict damage. If this move misses, the user takes damage instead.
The user attacks the target with unpleasant sound waves. For two turns, the target is prevented from recovering HP through moves, Abilities, or held items.
The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.
The user pours toxins into the target by wrapping them in a toxic, corrosive chain. This may also leave the target badly poisoned.
